LeadingHeadDescription.Ambitious: 野心之首宣称超出其地位的神位。它获得100临时生命值，持续1分钟。它还将获得对精魂伤害的20弱点，且在1分钟内不能再次使用索取神位。
LeadingHeadDescription.Assertive: 相柳游泳，然后进行一次近战打击。
LeadingHeadDescription.Capricious: The capricious head counteracts each mental effect on themself as a 10th-rank effect with a [[/r 1d20+32 #Counteract]]{+32} counteract modifier.
LeadingHeadDescription.NoHeadSelected: 在相柳每次现身期间，只要战斗开始就会有一颗头主导，由GM在掷骰先攻时选择。不同的头进行主导会赋予相柳一个不同的动作，可以在每轮第一个回合使用（见协调动作）。
LeadingHeadDescription.PeoplePleaser: 众首讨论并大声商定一个目标生物。直到再次使用达成共识，其对该目标的打击造成额外20精准伤害。
LeadingHeadDescription.Perfectionist: The perfectionist head criticizes a creature within their aura. The creature must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:42] save or take @Damage[9d6[persistent,mental]] damage.
LeadingHeadDescription.Playful: The playful head makes an ill-timed quip about the impermanence of life. They attempt to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} each creature within their aura.
LeadingHeadDescription.Secretive: The Great Flood is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} until the end of their turn and teleports to an open space within their aura.
LeadingHeadDescription.Suspicious: 相柳注视其周围的环境。直到其移动，他能够识破灵光范围内的幻术，且其颚咬的触及提升至25尺。

TongueOfFlame.DescriptionAddendum: When the despot casts charm, diabolic edict, enthrall, or floating flame, either a target takes @Damage[(@item.rank)[fire]] damage, or the despot gains a +2 status bonus to Deception checks for 1 round.

Life.DescriptionMajor: Each time you use a spell slot to cast a 5th-rank or higher spell that takes 2 or more actions to cast, you disperse vitality energy in a @Template[burst|distance:30] with the effects of a 3-action @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{Heal} spell with a rank 4 lower than that of the spell you cast. This healing occurs immediately after you finish @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.aBQ8ajvEBByv45yz]{Casting the Spell}. You don't benefit from this healing. Instead, you lose double the number of Hit Points rolled for the heal spell.
Life.DescriptionModerate: Whenever you finish casting a non-cantrip spell, you restore @Damage[@item.level[healing]] Hit Points to your choice of either one target of the spell or the creature nearest to you. You can't heal yourself in this way. This healing has the healing, necromancy, and vitality traits, as well as the tradition trait of the spell.

BlowgunPoisoner.StealthNote: In addition, if you make a blowgun Strike while @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected}, you don't automatically become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.1wQY3JYyhMYeeV2G]{Observed}. Instead, immediately attempt a @Check[stealth|against:perception] check against the Perception DC of the target. If you succeed, you don't become observed, and are hidden (if you were undetected, you still become hidden rather than remaining undetected).

DebilitatingBomb.AttackRollNote: The target must succed at a @Check[fortitude|against:alchemist], or suffer one of the following effects: dazzled, deafened, off-guard, or take a -5 foot status penalty to Speeds. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.VTJ8D23sOIfApEt3]{Effect: Debilitating Bomb}
DebilitatingBomb.GreaterAttackRollNote: The target must succed at a @Check[fortitude|against:alchemist], or suffer one of the following effects: clumsy 1, dazzled, deafened, enfeebled 1, off-guard, stupefied 1, or take a –10-foot status penalty to Speeds. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.VTJ8D23sOIfApEt3]{Effect: Debilitating Bomb}
DebilitatingBomb.TrueAttackRollNote: The target must succed at a @Check[fortitude|against:alchemist], or suffer one of the following effects: clumsy 1, dazzled, deafened, enfeebled 2, off-guard, stupefied 2, or take a –15-foot status penalty to Speeds. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.VTJ8D23sOIfApEt3]{Effect: Debilitating Bomb}

Bomber.FieldBenefit: 当投掷带有溅射特征的炼金炸弹时，你可以放弃通常的溅射区域，只对你的主要目标造成溅射伤害。

FieldVials.RollOptionLabel: 课题制剂 - 变种万用制剂伤害

Bomber.GreaterFieldDiscovery: 你可以提升炸弹的溅射范围，让它对周围10尺的生物造成溅射伤害，或者如果你具有溅射扩展专长，则为15尺。

FieldVials.Description: Your versatile vials can be used to heal a living creature @Damage[(ternary(gte(@item.level,18),4,ternary(gte(@item.level,12),3,ternary(gte(@item.level,4),2,1))))d6[healing]] Hit Points. A creature can drink the vial for this benefit, or you can throw the vial at a willing creature within 20 feet as an Interact action to heal that creature. In either case, a vial used this way loses the acid and splash traits and gains the coagulant and healing traits, plus the elixir trait if a creature drinks it.

FieldBenefit.Description: 当你使用一瓶突变药剂时，你会获得等同你的智力调整值（最低为0）加上你等级一半的临时生命值。这些临时生命值持续一分钟或者直到突变药剂持续结束，取其先者。你在接下来1分钟内无法再度通过这一方式获得临时生命值。

FieldVials.Description: You can drink the contents of one your versatile vials to suppress the drawback you take from one mutagen currently affecting you until the beginning of your next turn. A vial used this way loses the acid, bomb, and splash traits and gains the elixir trait. If you have more than one drawback due to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.jSkJIWPfSZZzvYzq]{Combine Elixirs} or a similar ability, drinking the vial suppresses one drawback of your choice.

FieldBenefit.RollOptionLabel: 毒理学家 — 造成酸蚀而非毒素伤害

FieldVials.Description: 你可以将万用制剂作为一种伤口型毒素涂抹在武器或者弹药上。将万用制剂的初始伤害添加在使用该武器或弹药的第一次成功的打击上。这一效果会在你当前回合结束时失效。

SupremeInvigoratingElixir.Description: For the purposes of counteracting effects with invigorating elixirs, treat your level as though it were 2 higher. Add the listed conditions to those you can choose for an invigorating elixir you create to counteract: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dTwPJuKgBQCMxixg]{Petrified}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned}. You can also choose a disease regardless of what, if any, conditions it imposes.

UncannyBombs.Note: You automatically succeed at the flat check when targeting a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} creature.

AldoriSwordlord.Note: Whenever you successfully Strike a creature with an Aldori dueling sword, you gain 5 temporary Hit Points (or 10 temporary Hit Point on a critical success) that last for 1 round. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.eJyyBqrXLOE4R9JI]{Effect: Aldori Swordlord (Temporary Hit Points)}.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.tCMVyxQhzYCjBQtK]

If a target is hit a second time by the same character's web attack while they have this penalty, they're instead @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} until they succeed at a check to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} against your class DC.

ComeAndGetMe.TemporaryHitPoints: When you strike a creature who hit you in the last round, you gain temporary Hit Points equal to your Constitution modifier, or double that on a critical hit. These temporary Hit Points last until the end of your rage. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.CYmipBeliNuymENB]{Effect: Come and Get Me (Temporary Hit Points)}

FuriousFinish.Note: After this Strike, your Rage immediately ends, and you are @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} until you rest for at least 10 minutes.
FuriousFinish.Prompt: 选择你的狂暴的剩余轮数。

Giant.Prompt: 选择狂暴的能量抗力类型。

InuredToAlchemy.CriticalSuccess: 每次对抗炼金毒药、毒品或成瘾的豁免获得大成功可降低3阶段。
InuredToAlchemy.CriticalSuccessVirulent: 每当你对恶性的炼金毒药、毒品或成瘾物成功豁免，将减少两个阶段。
InuredToAlchemy.Success: 每次对抗炼金毒药、毒品或成瘾的成功豁免可降低2阶段
InuredToAlchemy.SuccessVirulent: 每当你对恶性的炼金毒药、毒品或成瘾物成功豁免，将减少一个阶段

RenewedVigor.Prompt: 你这回合进行过攻击动作了吗？

SpiritsInterference.Note: You must succeed at a @Check[flat|dc:5|showDC:all] or the attack misses with no effect.

RagingResistance.Prompt: 选择一种关联魔法根源。

TriumphantInspiration.Note: 你发出一声得胜的呐喊，激励起盟友们。你施放一个已知且通常使用一个单动作施放的组曲戏法。

AnimalSenses.Prompt: 选择一种你的本源动物具有的感官

Senses.EcholocationPrecise: 将回声定位提升为精确感官
Senses.TremorsensePrecise: 将震颤感知提升为精确感官

ChosenWard.DefenseToggle: 选定监护 — 启用AC和反射豁免的加值
ChosenWard.FortuneToggle: 选定监护 — 启用反射豁免的幸运效果

CreatureOfMyth.Description: 你特化的统合伙伴获得了无与伦比的力量，成为了一头神话生物。其获得以下效果。

BalefulBody.Description: Your united companion's blood is boiling, its mechanical fluid is acidic, or its insides are otherwise destructive to the touch. Choose acid, fire, or poison. If your united companion would take damage from a melee attack, it deals @Damage[floor(@actor.level / 2)]{half your level} in damage of the chosen type to the creature that made the melee attack. By spending a Mythic Point when you Command your united companion, your united companion can spew its corrosive power as a 2-action activity to deal @Damage[14d6|options:area-damage|shortLabel] damage of the chosen type in a @Template[type:cone|distance:15] or @Template[type:line|distance:30] (@Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic|options:area-effect] save against your class DC or spell DC, whichever is higher).
BalefulBody.Label: 天灾之躯

ChimericHeads.Description: 你的统合伙伴长出了又一颗头颅，赋予其额外的眼睛和头部相关的无武装攻击。你的伙伴获得全域视野。你指挥统合伙伴时可以花费一个神话点，使其用一个单动作来进行两次无武装打击，两次打击都应用当前的多重攻击减值。两次打击都必须选择同一目标。若两次攻击均命中，则将两次伤害相加再应用其它可应用的效果。在增加多重攻击减值时该动作只计算一次攻击。你的统合伙伴必须拥有头部以及一种与头部相关的无武装攻击（譬如鸟喙，颚咬或虫颚）才能选择此选项。
ChimericHeads.Label: 空想之颅

EnergyAegis.Description: 你的统合伙伴能免受有害能量的伤害。选择酸蚀，寒冷，电击或火焰，你的统合伙伴对所选类型免疫。你的统合伙伴在对抗具有所选特征的效果或法术，或对抗具有所选特征的生物时在AC和豁免上获得+1状态加值。你指挥统合伙伴时可以花费一个神话点，使其用一个具有专注特征的单动作将上述增益分享给邻接于它的所有生物，直到你的下回合开始。
EnergyAegis.Label: 能量之盾

MagnificentFlight.Description: 你的统合伙伴长出了双翼，或是掌握了其它飞翔的方法。你的统合伙伴获得等同于其速度的飞行速度，并且获得骑乘特殊能力。如果你的统合伙伴已经拥有骑乘能力或飞行速度，则令其速度增加10尺。你指挥统合伙伴时可以花费一个神话点，使其可以用一个双动作行动来飞行两次，并且在飞行路径上的任意一点进行一次无武装近战攻击。
MagnificentFlight.Label: 壮美之翼

ProtectiveSkin.Description: 你的统合伙伴通体被异界魔力侵染而坚比金石。其最大HP提高30但获得对寒铁或银之一的10弱点。你指挥统合伙伴时可以花费一个神话点，使其获得等同于你等级的快速治疗，持续1分钟。
ProtectiveSkin.Label: 坚实之肤

WeAreOne.OffGuardToggle: 生而为一 — 让目标对你的打击措手不及

NothingPersonal.ToggleLabel: 无关私怨 - 首次对阻碍进行武器打击

Note.CriticalFailure: On a critical failure, the Strike deals no damage and you take @Damage[(ceil((@actor.flags.system.blinkCharge - 4)/2))d8[force]] damage.
Note.Failure: On a failure, the Strike deals no damage, but the target takes @Damage[(ceil((@actor.flags.system.blinkCharge - 4)/2))d8[force]] damage.

BloodlettingKukri.Note: If the target didn't already have persistent bleed damage when you scored the critical hit, you also gain [[/r 1d8]] temporary Hit Points.

BountyHunterDedication.GatherInfoHuntedPrey: 针对猎杀目标进行搜集信息

Cone.Label: 锥形
Cone.Description: Your eidolon exhales a blast of destructive energy. Your eidolon deals @Damage[((ceil(@actor.level/2))d6)[@actor.flags.system.breathweapon.breathDamage]|options:area-damage] damage to all creatures in a @Template[cone|distance:30], with a basic Reflex save against your spell DC.

Line.Label: 线形
Line.Description: Your eidolon exhales a blast of destructive energy. Your eidolon deals @Damage[((ceil(@actor.level/2))d6)[@actor.flags.system.breathweapon.breathDamage]|options:area-damage] damage to all creatures in a @Template[line|distance:60], with a basic Reflex save against your spell DC.

BreathWeapon.Cooldown: Your eidolon then can't use their Breath Weapon again for the next [[/r 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}.
BreathWeapon.Scaling: 在3级以及之后的每2级，伤害提升1d6。

ReleaseMe.BonusToggle: 给我放手！ — 启用近战打击加值

UltimatumOfLiberation.BonusIncreaseToggle: 解放通牒 — 豁免增益增加到+3

Anger.Activation: If you're @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}, or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}, you can attempt to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape}. If you succeed, the creature or hazard imposing the condition on you (if applicable) takes force damage equal to your level.
Anger.Description: 毁灭性的怒气催使你去伤害敌人，但这个过程也会造成你的痛苦。
Anger.Fallout: You become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} until you Settle your Emotions.
Anger.Fervor: When you Cast a Spell from your spell slots, if the spell deals damage and doesn't have a duration, you gain a status bonus to that spell's damage equal to the spell's rank. Spell: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.jsWthW1Qy6tg3SwD]{Draw Ire}
Anger.Label: 愤怒
Anger.Trigger: An enemy deals damage to you. You can't use this reaction if you're @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued}.

Awe.Activation: If you're @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied}, you can attempt an additional save to end the effect if it allowed a save.
Awe.Description: 你那强烈的赞叹足以感染或妨碍周遭的人。
Awe.Fallout: You become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until you Settle your Emotions.
Awe.Fervor: When you cast a spell, choose one creature that was hit by your spell attack roll or that failed its saving throw, if any. That creature becomes fascinated with you until the end of its next turn. It's then temporarily immune to this fervor effect for 1 hour. Spell: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.0qaqksrGGDj74HXE]{Revealing Light}
Awe.Label: 惊叹
Awe.Trigger: 你或30尺内盟友在对敌人AC的攻击检定，或是在对抗敌人DC的的技能检定上得到大成功。

Dedication.Activation: 你的情绪焦点获得临时生命值，数量等于你的角色等级的一半，向上取整。这份临时生命值持续1分钟。
Dedication.Description: 你承诺保护某人，但这份承诺也可能导致依赖。你的情绪焦点依附于一个特定生物。
Dedication.Fallout: 在安顿情绪前，除非你和你的情绪焦点相邻，否则你无法施展法术。
Dedication.Fervor: Your spells that target your emotional focus gain the benefits of Reach Spell. When you cast a healing spell that affects your emotional focus, your emotional focus also gains temporary HP equal to the spell's rank in addition to the spell's effects. These temporary HP last for 1 minute. Spell: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.yHujiDQPdtXW797e]{Spirit Link}
Dedication.Label: 奉献
Dedication.Trigger: 你的情绪焦点在离你30尺内受到敌人伤害。

Fear.Activation: Increase your frightened value by 1, to a maximum of @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 4}.
Fear.Description: 你让恐惧成为你的燃料而非负担，但这也会燃烧你的耐力。
Fear.Fallout: You are @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing} for 2 rounds, running from the source of the frightened condition that triggered your Catharsis. If that source is no longer present, you instead flee from the position where you were at the start of your emotional fallout.
Fear.Fervor: You don't take the status penalty from the frightened condition to your spell DCs or spell attack bonus. Instead, you gain a status bonus to spell attack rolls equal to the penalty you would've taken, and your foes take the same status penalty to their saving throws against your spells. Any other statistic takes the status penalty as normal. Spell: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.4koZzrnMXhhosn0D]{Fear}
Fear.Label: 恐惧

Hatred.Activation: 你可以快步或行走。在结束这次移动时，你必须比原本更靠近你的情绪焦点。
Hatred.Description: 你让未加修饰的仇怨吞噬你的灵魂，连你的敌人也因此动摇。你的情绪焦点是一个受你憎恨的特定敌人。
Hatred.Fervor: Your emotional focus is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} to you and takes a –2 status penalty to saves against your spells. You're off-guard to your emotional focus and take a –2 status penalty to saves against it. Spell: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.TaaMEYdZXQXF0Sks]{Blood Vendetta}
Hatred.Label: 仇恨
Hatred.Trigger: 在与你的情绪焦点，或是他的一个追随者的遭遇中，开始你的第一个回合。如果遭遇中包括多个符合条件的追随者，但不包括你真正的情绪焦点，请选择其中一个追随者作为这次遭遇的情绪焦点（或直到你真正的情绪焦点出现）。

Joy.Activation: Reduce the value of any @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied} condition you have by 1 and end any persistent mental damage you have.
Joy.Description: 恣肆的热情和正面的态度可以带你走向成功，但也可能比原本的计划消耗你更多精力。
Joy.Fallout: You become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} until you Settle your Emotions.
Joy.Fervor: You gain a +1 status bonus to Performance checks and to the spell attack rolls of emotion spells, and enemies take a –1 status penalty to saves against your emotion spells. Spell: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.tlSE7Ly8vi1Dgddv]{Laughing Fit}
Joy.Label: 喜悦
Joy.Trigger: 你在一次攻击检定或豁免检定中得到大成功，或是一个敌人在对抗你的豁免检定中大失败。

Love.Activation: If either you or your emotional focus is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.9qGBRpbX9NEwtAAr]{Controlled}, one of you can attempt a new saving throw against one confusing or controlling effect (if it allowed a save), ending the condition if the new save is a success. If both of you are eligible, your emotional focus gets the new save.
Love.Description: 爱的牵绊联系着你，没有什么可以打破它，但爱也会分散你对生活中其他事物的注意力。你的情绪焦点是你爱的人；但他们不一定要爱你。
Love.Fallout: You're @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} with your emotional focus for 1 minute.
Love.Fervor: You gain a +1 status bonus to Will saves. If you cast a spell to benefit your emotional focus, this bonus increases to +3 until the start of your next turn. Spell: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.szIyEsvihc5e1w8n]{Soothe}
Love.Toggle: 施展一个法术让你的情绪焦点获得好处
Love.Label: 爱
Love.Trigger: 你的情绪焦点在距离你 30 尺的范围内受到敌人伤害。

Misery.Activation: 你获得与角色等级相等的临时生命值，持续 1 分钟。
Misery.Description: 受苦让你知道自己还活着；让你的敌人感受一样的痛苦，可以缓解你的痛苦。
Misery.Fallout: 在你安顿情绪前施放任何法术，所造成的任何伤害都会受到无类型减值。减值为每法术环级 –1。
Misery.Fervor: You can choose not to attempt a flat check to end persistent damage you're taking. When you cast a damaging spell, you can choose one creature that failed its save or that you hit with your spell attack roll. That target takes persistent damage of the same type the spell dealt, of an amount equal to the highest amount of persistent damage you currently have. You can't choose a creature that's already taking persistent damage. Spell: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.R8bqnYiThB6MYTxD]{Phantom Pain}
Misery.Label: 苦痛
Misery.Trigger: 一个敌人对你造成持续伤害。

Pride.Description: 只要看起来没事，你就不会出乱子，但你常困在当下，忘记其他重要的事。
Pride.Fallout: You momentarily lose track of what's real, becoming @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} for 1 round. Spell: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.j8vIoIEWElvpwkcI]{Mirror Image}
Pride.Fervor: Each time you cast an illusion spell, until the start of your next turn, any critical failure you roll on an attack roll or saving throw is a failure instead. Spell: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.UKsIOWmMx4hSpafl]{Dizzying Colors}
Pride.Label: 骄傲
Pride.Trigger: 你在一次攻击检定或豁免检定中掷出大失败。

Remorse.Activation: 你进行快步或行走。这次移动结束时必须比原本更靠近触发此效果的盟友。
Remorse.Description: 你想要克服自己的失败，但内疚依然与你同在。
Remorse.Fallout: Your emotional weight crushes you, leaving you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} until you Settle your Emotions.
Remorse.Fervor: Any spell you cast that restores Hit Points to the triggering ally gets a status bonus to the Hit Points healed equal to the spell's rank, or double the spell's rank if the ally is at 0 Hit Points. Spell: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.kIwA7kwp5E0AC3yM]{Warrior's Regret}
Remorse.Label: 悔恨
Remorse.Trigger: 30 尺内一名盟友的生命值降至 0。

CelestialResistance.Prompt: 选择一种和你的血统关联的能量

MentorOfLegends.Description: 在其常规效果之外，此法术还会赋予等同于你等级一半的临时生命值。但你无法对自己施放此法术。

AuraOfFaith.Toggle: 本轮对邪秽（Unholy）生物的首次打击

Champion.BladeAllyRune: 为利刃盟友选择一个性能符文

BlessedSwiftness.RollOptionLabel: 针对一个被你的移动触发的反应动作进行防御

ExaltedGreatness.Grandeur: 你辉煌闪耀产生的显光尘效果持续1分钟。
ExaltedGreatness.Iniquity: The damage dealt to enemies other than the triggering creatures increases by @Damage[(ternary(gte(@actor.level,19),6,ternary(gte(@actor.level,16),5,ternary(gte(@actor.level,12),4,ternary(gte(@actor.level,9),3,ternary(gte(@actor.level,5),2,1))))))[spirit]] damage (apply this after you halve the damage).
ExaltedGreatness.Justice: 激昂反应额外攻击的减值为-2而非-5。
ExaltedGreatness.Label: 激昂伟力
ExaltedGreatness.Liberation: 除触发盟友之外，你与受激昂反应影响的所有角色均可以尝试挣脱相应效果。
ExaltedGreatness.Obedience: The damage dealt to creatures other than the triggering creature who refuse to drop @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} increases to half the damage the triggering creature would take (roll the damage only once for all affected creatures).
ExaltedGreatness.Redemption: 激昂反应赋予的抗力不会减少。

ExaltedReaction.Desecration: Each enemy in your champion's aura takes a –1 status penalty to attack rolls against you until the start of your next turn. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.Ef63SlxSKlZmHosM]{Effect: Exalted Reaction (Desecrator)}
ExaltedReaction.Grandeur: 除了受到辉煌闪耀影响的敌人之外，身处你神卫灵光范围内的其他敌人也会在1轮内受到_显光尘_法术的影响。
ExaltedReaction.Iniquity: 除了触发反应的生物外，你同时对神卫灵光范围内的其他敌人造成伤害，数值等同于对触发反应的生物造成伤害的一半。
ExaltedReaction.Justice: 若触发反应的敌人处于盟友的触及内，且这些盟友都身处你神卫灵光范围内，他们可以花费一个反应动作以-5的减值对该名敌人进行打击。
ExaltedReaction.Liberation: 除了受到解放踏步影响的盟友之外，你和其他身处你神卫灵光范围内的盟友也能以一个自由动作进行快步。即使受益于解放踏步的盟友无法移动，你和其他盟友依然能获得上述增益。
ExaltedReaction.Obedience: Each enemy in your champion's aura other than the triggering creature must also either drop @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} or take mental damage (each enemy chooses). These creatures take only minimum damage (typically @Damage[(ternary(gte(@actor.level,19),6,ternary(gte(@actor.level,16),5,ternary(gte(@actor.level,12),4,ternary(gte(@actor.level,11),3)))))[mental]] damage), and the effects they take can't be adjusted by anything that changes your Iron Command. For instance, the Iron Repercussions feat couldn't turn the damage into persistent mental damage for creatures other than the triggering creature.
ExaltedReaction.Redemption: If the enemy refuses, you can choose to grant the resistance to yourself and all allies in your champion's aura, including the triggering ally. If you do, the resistance is reduced by 2 for all @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.GFLiTESBmoyQ3sLx]{Effect: Exalted Reaction (Redemption)}

GreaterSecurity.Description: 当伴随他人的精魂之盾生效时，如果你举起盾牌，被精魂之盾伴随的盟友也会获得你的盾牌给予的AC加值，并且只要该盟友满足触发条件，你便能触发盾牌格挡。这会使用你盾牌的数据，而你的盾牌也会如常承受伤害。
GreaterSecurity.RollOptionLabel: 高等卫戍 — 神卫已举盾

GruesomeStrike.Note: The target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|against:class] save against your class DC or be @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}.

IronRepercussions.Description: Disobeying your Iron Command has lasting consequences. If an enemy refuses to kneel to you, you can deal @Damage[(ternary(gte(@actor.level,19),6,ternary(gte(@actor.level,16),5,ternary(gte(@actor.level,12),4,ternary(gte(@actor.level,9),3,ternary(gte(@actor.level,5),2,1))))))d6[persistent,mental]] instead of normal mental damage. You must decide whether the mental damage will be persistent before your enemy chooses whether to kneel or not. The amount of damage is unchanged.

OathOfTheSlayer.RollOptionLabel: 屠灭誓约 — 双倍额外伤害

OngoingSelfishness.Description: After you use Selfish Shield, you gain resistance to all further damage from the triggering enemy until the end of the turn on which you used the reaction. This resistance is equal to half your Selfish Shield resistance. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.seOQfjfjrDyK6rCo]{Effect: Ongoing Selfishness}

RangedReprisal.Description: 你能够在更远的距离上使用报应打击。你能够在进行报应打击时，取代近战打击，转而使用远程武器进行远程打击。触发反应的敌人需要位于射程而非触及之内，并且其仍然要身处你神卫灵光范围内。你也能够对站位稍远的敌人进行近战打击。如果触发反应的敌人在你的触及之外，且在你触及周围5尺之内，作为反应的一部分，你能够在进行近战报应打击之前使用快步将敌人置于你的触及之内。

RelentlessReaction.Grandeur: The enemy also takes @Damage[(@actor.abilities.cha.mod)[persistent,spirit]|traits:holy] damage, and it can't recover from this persistent damage while affected by the _revealing light_ from your Flash of Grandeur.
RelentlessReaction.Iniquity: An enemy damaged by the initial reaction's damage also takes @Damage[(@actor.abilities.cha.mod)[persistent,spirit]|traits:unholy] damage.
RelentlessReaction.Liberation: You punish those who ensnare your allies. If the triggering enemy was using any effects to make your ally grabbed, restrained, immobilized, or paralyzed when you used Liberating Step, that enemy takes @Damage[(@actor.abilities.cha.mod)[persistent,spirit]] damage
RelentlessReaction.LiberationHoly: You punish those who ensnare your allies. If the triggering enemy was using any effects to make your ally grabbed, restrained, immobilized, or paralyzed when you used Liberating Step, that enemy takes @Damage[(@actor.abilities.cha.mod)[persistent,spirit]|traits:holy] damage
RelentlessReaction.LiberationUnholy: You punish those who ensnare your allies. If the triggering enemy was using any effects to make your ally grabbed, restrained, immobilized, or paralyzed when you used Liberating Step, that enemy takes @Damage[(@actor.abilities.cha.mod)[persistent,spirit]|traits:unholy] damage
RelentlessReaction.ObedienceRedemption: If the enemy refuses, it takes @Damage[(@actor.abilities.cha.mod)[persistent,spirit]] damage
RelentlessReaction.ObedienceRedemptionHoly: If the enemy refuses, it takes @Damage[(@actor.abilities.cha.mod)[persistent,spirit]|traits:holy] damage
RelentlessReaction.ObedienceUnholy: If the enemy refuses, it takes @Damage[(@actor.abilities.cha.mod)[persistent,spirit]|traits:unholy] damage

Security.Description: 代替原本的一个动作，你能够使用2个动作施展精魂之盾。若你如此做，你能够选择一名身处你神卫灵光范围内的盟友，令其获得伴随左右的精魂之盾。在1分钟内，盟友获得精魂之盾的增益，即使盟友离开你的神卫灵光或者你不再举起盾牌，这个增益也不会消失。如果你创造出另一面伴随他人的盾牌，先前的那面便会消失。

Champion.TargetReaction: 目标触发了你的神卫反应

UnimpededStep.Description: 伴随着神圣解放之力的爆发，因为你的解放踏步而得以移动的盟友免受困难地形、高等困难地形、狭窄平面和不稳表面的影响。如果你获得激昂反应的增益，上述好处将适用于所有进行快步的人。

WeightOfGuilt.Description: Guilt clouds the minds of those who ignore your Glimpse of Redemption. Instead of making the triggering creature enfeebled 2, you can make it @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} for the same duration.

ChangeShape.Anadi: You change into your human or spider shape. Each shape has a specific, persistent appearance. In your human shape, you can't use unarmed attacks granted by your ancestry. You aren't off-guard when climbing in your spider shape. However, in your spider shape you can't use weapons, shields, or other held items of any sort, and you are limited in what actions you can take that have the manipulate trait. The only manipulate actions you can take are to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.aBQ8ajvEBByv45yz]{Cast a Spell} with somatic components, weave silk or webbing, or simple @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.pvQ5rY2zrtPI614F]{Interact} actions such as opening an unlocked door. Your spider legs can't perform actions that require fingers or significant manual dexterity, including any action that would require a check to accomplish. The GM might determine other manipulate actions are appropriate for your spider legs.
ChangeShape.Beastkin: 你变成类人形态或人兽混合形态。每种形态都拥有特定的、固有的外观，大多兽化裔都在默认情况下保持混合形态。在混合形态下，你的外表看起来同时具有你的族裔和本源动物的特征。当你处于混合形态时，你获得啃咬作为非武装打击，这取决于你所选的本源动物（蝙蝠为尖牙、鹰为鸟喙、黄蜂为虫颚，以此类推）。你的啃咬造成1d4穿刺伤害，拥有灵巧、娴熟和非武装特征，并且属于搏击武器组。而在类人形态下，你保持原本族裔的外观。
ChangeShape.Kitsune: You transform into a specific alternate form determined by your heritage. If your heritage doesn't list a form, your alternate form is a tailless form, which is a common Medium humanoid ancestry prevalent where you grew up (typically human). This form is the same age and body type as your true form and has roughly analogous physical traits, such as hair color. Using Change Shape counts as creating a disguise for the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{Impersonate} use of Deception. You lose any unarmed Strikes you gained from a kitsune heritage or ancestry feat in this form. You can remain in your alternate form indefinitely, and you can shift back to your true kitsune form by using this action again.
ChangeShape.Tanuki: You can transform into a mundane raccoon dog, using the statistics of @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.gfPjmG6Fe6D3MFjl]{Pest Form}. This is a specific raccoon dog form that's the same age and body type as your true form and has roughly analogous physical traits, such as hair color. Using Change Shape counts as creating a disguise for the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{Impersonate} use of Deception. You lose any unarmed Strikes you gained from a tanuki heritage or ancestry feat in this form. You can remain in your raccoon dog form indefinitely, and you can shift back to your tanuki form by using this action again.
ChangeShape.Werecreature: 你变形成自己的混合或动物形态。你的装备会随着你一起变化，且会持续提供加值，但是你的动物形态无法使用武器、盾牌或其他持用的物品，也无法使用操作动作。你会根据自身的化形生物类型获得移动速度、无武装攻击、以及潜在的其他能力。这些无武装攻击属于搏击武器组。你能解消该效果来回复到自己的类人形态，若你的生命值降低至0点，也会自动回复到自己的类人形态。
ChangeShape.Yaoguai: You transform to or from your true yaoguai form into a humanoid alternate form, which is a common Medium humanoid ancestry prevalent where you were born (typically human). This form is the same apparent age and body type as your yaoguai form and has roughly analogous physical traits, such as hair color. Using Change Shape counts as creating a disguise for the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{Impersonate} use of Deception. You can remain in your humanoid form indefinitely, but you revert to your yaoguai form after 1 hour of unconsciousness or 1 minute after death.

animist.Description: 精魂力量增强了你的身体。你的强韧豁免熟练度提升为专家。

bard.Description: 你的肉体在冒险途中变得愈发强壮。你在强韧豁免上的熟练度提升至专家。

druid.Description: 你的肉体在冒险途中变得愈发强壮。你在强韧豁免上的熟练度提升至专家。

investigator.Description: 你的肉体在冒险途中变得愈发强壮。你在强韧豁免上的熟练度提升至专家。

psychic.Description: Your mind holds your body to a subconscious mental image of yourself. Your proficiency rank for Fortitude saves increases to expert.

swashbuckler.Description: 你的肉体在冒险途中变得愈发强壮。你在强韧豁免上的熟练度提升至专家。

barbarian.Description: 你的身体对肉体方面的磨难习以为常，令病痛难以入侵。你在强韧豁免上的熟练度提升为大师。当你在强韧豁免中获得成功时，改为获得大成功。

gunslinger.Description: 你的身体习惯于承受物理伤害和抵抗细菌与疾病。你的强韧豁免的熟练度提升至大师。当你的强韧豁免骰出成功时，你改为获得大成功。

inventor.Description: 你的身体习惯于对抗物理疼痛，并能够很好的抵抗疾病。你在强韧豁免上的熟练度提升至大师。当你在强韧豁免中骰出成功，将其改为大成功。

magus.Description: 你的身体习惯于承受物理伤害和抵抗大多数疾病。你在强韧豁免上的熟练等级提升至大师等级。当你在一个强韧豁免检定上骰出成功时，改为获得大成功。

thaumaturge.Description: 你的身体习惯于承受物理伤害和抵抗疾病。你在强韧豁免上的熟练等级提升至大师等级。当你在一个强韧豁免检定上骰出成功时，改为获得大成功。

oracle.Description: 魔力增强了你身体的韧性。你在强韧豁免上的熟练度提升至专家。

sorcerer.Description: 魔力增强了你身体的韧性。你在强韧豁免上的熟练度提升至专家。

witch.Description: 你的庇护主的力量增加了你身体的韧性。你在强韧豁免上的熟练度提升至专家。

wizard.Description: 魔力增强了你身体的韧性。你在强韧豁免上的熟练度提升至专家。

barbarian.Description: 你的本能让你的所有感官变得更加敏锐。你在察觉上的熟练度提升为大师。

bard.Description: 你对细致入微的事物也有着敏锐的察觉。你在察觉上的熟练度提升至大师。

commander.Description: 你已经具备了从各个方面看待问题的能力。你的察觉熟练度提升至大师。

exemplar.Description: 随着你的冒险，你发展出对细节的敏锐感知和关注。你的察觉熟练等级提升至大师。

gunslinger.Description: 你对细节之处有了更加敏锐的觉察力与注意力。你在察觉上的熟练度提升至大师。

investigator.Description: 随着你的冒险，你发展出对细节的敏锐感知和关注。你的察觉熟练等级提升至大师。

ranger.Description: 你对各种细节具有极高的敏感性和关注力。你在察觉上的熟练度提升至大师。

rogue.Description: 你对细节之处有了更加敏锐的觉察力与注意力。你在察觉上的熟练度提升至大师。

swashbuckler.Description: 你的冒险生涯令你对于细节有了敏锐的认知和关注。你在察觉上的熟练等级提升至大师。

thaumaturge.Description: 经历冒险之后，你的感官变得锐利，注意力变得细致。你在察觉上的熟练度提升至大师。

animist.Description: 与灵体同伴一起训练让你的武器技巧有所改善。你的简易武器和无武装攻击熟练度提升至专家。

summoner.Description: 练习与魔法增进了你的武器技艺。你在简易武器和无武装攻击上的熟练度提升至专家。

animist.Expert: 精魂的力量在你体内自由流淌。你的法术攻击和法术DC熟练度提升至专家。
animist.Legendary: 你是外界魔法能量的近乎完美的通道。你的法术攻击和法术DC熟练度提升至传奇。
animist.Master: 你与绑定的附灵间的亲密联系进一步的增强了你的魔法威力。你的法术攻击和法术DC熟练度提升至大师。

bard.Expert: 你的魔法技艺愈加强大。你在法术攻击调整和法术DC上的熟练度提升至专家。
bard.Legendary: 你对魔法的号令是那些传奇故事的素材。你在法术攻击调整和法术DC上的熟练度提升至传奇。
bard.Master: 你拨动魔法之弦如同拨弄竖琴般轻而易举。你在法术攻击调整和法术DC上的熟练度提升至大师。

druid.Expert: 你加深了对原能力量的控制，增强了你的法术。你在法术攻击调整和法术DC上的熟练度提升至专家。
druid.Legendary: 你与自然的魔法间达成了无与伦比的和谐。你在法术攻击调整和法术DC上的熟练度提升至传奇。
druid.Master: 原能魔法遵从你的指令。你在法术攻击调整和法术DC上的熟练度提升至大师。

magus.Expert: 你对魔法的基础理解得以提升，使你的法术更加难以抵抗。你在奥术法术攻击骰以及法术DC上的熟练度提升至专家等级。
magus.Master: 你凭借大师级造诣强化你的法术。你在奥术法术攻击骰和法术DC上的熟练度提升至大师等级。

oracle.Expert: 你在神术力量上的感悟日益明晰。你在法术攻击调整和法术DC上的熟练度提升至专家。
oracle.Legendary: 你能够利用他人无法比拟等级的神力。你在法术攻击调整和法术DC上的熟练度提高至传奇。
oracle.Master: 你理解了自己秘示域中深邃而复杂的神力。你在法术攻击调整和法术DC上的熟练度提高至大师。

psychic.Expert: 自我反省的过程让你更深入地了解了自己，也同时获得了更强大的心能力量。你在异能法术上的法术攻击骰和法术DC的熟练度提升至专家。
psychic.Legendary: 你感觉自己不仅理解了自己的心灵，还理解了作为一切心智力量源泉的集体无意识。你在异能法术上的法术攻击骰和法术DC的熟练等级提升至传奇。
psychic.Master: 你挖掘了心灵更深的角落，进一步强化了心能力量。你在异能法术上的法术攻击骰和法术DC的熟练等级提升至大师。

sorcerer.Expert: 你内在的魔力能够更为简单有效地回应你的命令。你在血统所对应的魔法根源的法术攻击调整值和法术DC上的熟练等级提升至专家。
sorcerer.Legendary: 你在施法上展现出了卓越的天赋。你在法术攻击调整值和法术DC上的熟练等级提升至传奇。
sorcerer.Master: 你已经完全驾驭住了流淌在血液中的魔力。你在法术攻击调整值和法术DC上的熟练等级提升至大师。

summoner.Expert: 在你深化与幻灵的联结之时，你的法术强度也得到了提升。你在幻灵决定的根源上的法术攻击调整值和法术DC的熟练度提升至专家。
summoner.Master: 你与幻灵之间的联结极其强大，能够让你掌握联结法术的精髓。你在幻灵决定的魔法根源的法术攻击调整值和法术DC上的熟练度提升至大师。

witch.Expert: 你学会了更好的控制庇护主给你的力量，你在法术攻击调整和法术DC上的熟练度提升至专家。
witch.Legendary: 你对于庇护主给予的魔法已臻至完美。你在法术攻击调整和法术DC上的熟练度提升至传奇。
witch.Master: 你已精通庇护主的魔法。你在法术攻击调整和法术DC上的熟练度提升至大师。

wizard.Expert: 对奥术长久的实践强化了你的实力。你在法术攻击调整和法术DC上的熟练度提升至专家。
wizard.Legendary: 你是个已达化境的施法者，在奥术的理论与实践层面上都有着无比全面的认知。你在法术攻击调整和法术DC上的熟练度提升至传奇。
wizard.Master: 你驱使至高的施法能力。你在法术攻击调整和法术DC上的熟练度提升至大师。

bard.PartOne: 你可以施放的法术集合被称为法术库。在1级时，你学会由你选择的两个1环异能法术以及五个异能戏法。你可以选择异能法术列表中的常见法术，或者当你拥有许可时也可以选择其它异能法术。你可以使用对应环级的法术位来施放法术库中的任意法术。
bard.PartTwo: 在你提升等级的时候也会扩充法术库。每当你获得一个法术位（见吟游诗人每日法术表），你可以将一个同环级法术加入法术库。在2级时，你选择另一个1环法术；在3级时，你选择两个2环法术，依此类推。当你添加法术时，你也能添加一个已有法术的高环版本，从而让你可以升环施放该法术。
bard.PartThree: 尽管获取速度相同，但你的法术位与法术库中的法术是彼此独立的。如果某专长或其它能力将法术加入你的法术库中，它并不会同时赋予你对应的法术位，反之亦然。
bard.SpellSwapping: 当你在法术库中获得新的法术时，你可能会想要替换之前学习的一些法术。每次你获得新的等级学习新的法术时，你可以将一个旧法术置换为一个同一环级的不同法术。被替换的法术可以是戏法。你也可以通过休整期重训来替换法术。

oracle.PartOne: 你可以施放的法术集合被称为法术库。在1级时，你学会由你选择的三个1环神术法术以及五个神术戏法。你可以选择神术法术列表中的常见法术，或者当你拥有许可时也可以选择其它神术法术。你可以使用对应环级的法术位来施放法术库中的任意法术。
oracle.PartTwo: 在你提升等级的时候也会扩充法术库。每当你获得一个法术位（见先知每日法术表），你可以将一个同环级法术加入法术库。在2级时，你选择另一个1环法术；在3级时，你选择三个2环法术，依此类推。当你添加法术时，你也能添加一个已有法术的高环版本，从而让你可以升环施放该法术。
oracle.PartThree: 你的法术位与法术库中的法术是彼此独立的。如果某专长或其它能力将法术加入你的法术库中，它并不会同时赋予你对应的法术位，反之亦然。
oracle.SpellSwapping: 当你在法术库中获得新的法术时，你可能会想要替换之前学习的一些法术。每次你获得新的等级学习新的法术时，你可以将一个旧法术置换为一个同一环级的不同法术。被替换的法术可以是戏法。你也可以通过休整期重训来替换法术。

psychic.PartOne: 你可以施展的法术集合被称为你的法术库。1级时，你学会1个你所选择的1环异能法术和3个异能戏法。你从异能法术表中选择常见法术，或选择你得到许可的其他异能法术。你能够花费一个合适环级的法术位施展法术库中的任何法术。你所选择的显意识也在你的法术库中添加额外法术，你的显意识开始时会为你提供1个额外1环法术和2个戏法，你将其作为心能戏法施展。
psychic.PartTwo: 当你升级时，你能在法术库中添加法术。每当你获得1个法术位（见心能者每日法术表），你在法术库中添加1个同环级的法术。2级时，你选择另一个1环法术。3级时，你选择1个2环法术，以此类推。当你添加法术时，你也可以添加一个你已经拥有的法术的高环级版本，这样你就可以施展该法术的升阶版本。你的显意识在你获得高环级法术时也会在你的法术库中添加额外法术。
psychic.PartThree: 虽然你获得法术位和法术库中的法术的速度相同，但这两者是互相独立的。如果1个专长或其他能力在你的法术库中添加了法术，例如你通过显意识获得了法术，它不会为你提供额外的法术位，反之亦然。
psychic.SpellSwapping: 当你在法术库中获得新的法术，你可能想要替换掉你已经学会的部分法术。每当你获得了1个等级并学习了新法术，你都可以将你的1个旧法术交换为同环级的不同法术。这个法术可以是一个戏法。你也可以通过在休整期中进行重训来交换法术。

sorcerer.PartOne: 你可施放的法术集合被称为法术库。1级时，你将学会所选的两个1环法术和4个戏法，以及血统赋予你的额外法术和戏法。你从你血统对应的魔法根源中的常见法术里选择这些法术，或者从你获得许可的其他源自你魔法根源的法术中进行选择。你可以使用对应环级的法术位施展任何你法术库中的法术。
sorcerer.PartTwo: 你在提升等级时也会在法术库中加入新法术。每当你获得一个法术位时（见术士每日法术表），你将一个同环的法术加入法术库。当你获得新的法术环位时，你的第一个新法术总是对应环级的你血统的馈赠法术，然后你可以选择其他你获取的法术。2级时，你选择另一个1环级法术；3级时，你获得一个新的馈赠法术并且选择其他两个2环级法术，以此类推。当你添加法术时，你可以添加已有法术的高级版本，这样你就可以施展这个法术的升阶版本了。
sorcerer.PartThree: 虽然获得的速度相同，你的法术位和法术库中的法术是分离的。如果一个专长或者其他能力将法术加入你的法术库中，你不会获得另一个法术位，反之亦然。
sorcerer.SpellSwapping: 当你在法术库中获得新的法术时，你可能会想要替换之前学习的一些法术。每次你获得新的等级学习新的法术时，你可以将一个旧法术置换为一个同一环级的不同法术。被替换的法术可以是戏法，但是你不能替换血统法术。你也可以通过休整期重训来替换法术。

summoner.PartOne: 你可以施展的法术集合被称为你的法术库。1级时，你学会两个你所选择的1环法术和5个戏法。你从幻灵相关根源中选择常见法术，或从该根源中选择你能够接触到的其他法术。你能够花费一个合适环级的法术位施展法术库中的法术。你的法术位和法术库中的法术是互相独立的。如果一个专长或其他能力给你的法术库中添加了一个法术，它不会给你额外的法术位；反之亦然。
summoner.PartTwo: 当你升级时，你能在法术库中添加法术。每当你获得1个法术位（见召唤师每日法术表），你在法术库中添加1个同环级的法术。你每次升级，都能重新选择法术库中的法术。2级时，你选择另一个1环级法术。3级时，你在法术库中添加第一个2环级法术。4级时，你获得第二个2环级法术，然后你的法术库中的法术数量达到上限，即5个法术。
summoner.PartThree: 5级时，在法术库中添加2个3级法术之余，你失去你最低环级的法术位。每当你失去了某一环级的法术位，你同时失去法术库中的2个法术。这些可能来自于你已经知晓的法术，或者你正在学习的新法术。在你不会改变法术位的等级，你可以交换多个法术，见下文描述。
summoner.SpellSwapping: 当你在法术库中获得新的法术，你可能想要替换掉你已经学会的部分法术。每当你获得了1个等级并学习了新法术，你都可以将你的1个旧法术交换为同环级的不同法术。如果在该等级你会失去一组低环法术位，你可以按照任意顺序交换2个旧法术。你也可以改为交换1个戏法。你也可以通过重训在休整期时交换法术。

champion.Description: 你忘我地探究手中武器的纷繁奥妙之处。你在简易武器、军用武器和无武装攻击上的熟练度提升至专家。

investigator.Description: 你忘我地探究手中武器的纷繁奥妙之处。你在简易武器、军用武器和无武装攻击上的熟练度提升至专家。

druid.Description: 你提升了自己的战斗技巧。你在简易武器和无武装攻击上的熟练度提升至专家。

exemplar.Description: 你不懈掌握武器的精妙之处。你的军用武器、简易武器、和无武装攻击的熟练等级提升至专家。

guardian.Description: 有时候，进攻就是最好的防御。你在简易武器、军用武器和无武装攻击上的熟练度提升至专家。

kineticist.Description: 你精进了战斗技巧。你的简易武器和无武装攻击的熟练度提升至专家。

magus.Description: 你投身于学习你所持用的武器的复杂之处。你在简易武器、军用武器和无武装攻击上的熟练等级提升至专家等级。

oracle.Description: 你致力于学习武器的精妙。你在简易武器和无武装攻击上的熟练等级提升至专家。

psychic.Description: 训练和魔法也加强了你的武器技巧。你在简易武器和无武装攻击上的熟练等级提升至专家。

sorcerer.Description: 你提高了你的武器熟练。你在简易武器和无武装攻击上的熟练等级提升至专家。

swashbuckler.Description: 你投入学习所持用的武器的精细技巧。你在简易武器、军用武器和无武装攻击上的熟练等级提升至专家。你在所有熟练度为专家的武器上获得重击专精效果。

thaumaturge.Description: You've learned the secret ways your weapons work most effectively. Your proficiency ranks for unarmed attacks, simple weapons, and martial weapons increase to expert.

witch.Description: 通过纯粹的经验，你已经提高了你的武器熟练。你在简易武器和无武装攻击上的熟练度提升至专家。

wizard.Description: 通过纯粹的经验，你已经提高了你的武器熟练。你在简易武器和无武装攻击上的熟练度提升至专家。

BattleHarbinger.DivineFont: Instead of preparing @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{Heal} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.wdA52JJnsuQWeyqz]{Harm} spells with your divine font, you instead gain the battle font, which allows you to prepare battle aura spells. You gain 4 additional spell slots each day at your highest rank of cleric spell slots. You can prepare only @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.7ZinJNzxq0XF0oMx]{Bane} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.XSujb7EsSwKl19Uu]{Bless} in these slots. Any feats and effects that refer to a battle aura refers to these spells, regardless of whether they were cast with your standard spell slots or your divine font spell slots. At 5th level, the number of additional slots increases to 5, and at 15th level, the total number of additional slots increases to 6. Your battle auras use your class DC instead of your spell DC.

CastigatingWeapon.Note: After you deal spirit damage due to Divine Castigation, your weapon or unarmed Strikes gain your holy or unholy trait and deal additional spirit damage until the end of your turn. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.BTI4obxa5UmNltyU]{Effect: Castigating Weapon}

ChannelingBlock.Description: 你将神术能量倾泻到一次不顾一切的格挡之中。当你使用盾牌格挡时，你可以花费一个伤害术或治疗术法术。该法术每有一环级骰1d8，本次格挡中的盾牌硬度提高掷骰结果之和。

CommunalHealing.Note: When you cast the heal spell to heal a single creature, choose another willing living creature within range of your heal to regain @Damage[@item.rank[vitality,healing]|shortLabel] Hit Points.

CompetitiveEdge.RollOptionLabel: 竞争优势 — 增加状态加值

CremateUndead.Note: When you use a heal spell to damage undead, each undead that takes damage also takes @Damage[(@item.rank)[persistent,fire]].

DeitysProtection.Description: 当你唤来你神祇的力量展现祂们领域的奇迹时，你会获得神力的庇护。在施放一个领域法术后，你获得全伤害抗力直到你的下回合开始。抗力数值等同于你施放的领域法术环级。

DirectedChannel.ItemAlterationNote: You can make the area a @Template[cone|distance:60] instead of an emanation.

DivineRebuttal.Note: If your Strike hits, all your allies gain a +2 circumstance bonus to the triggering saving throw (or a +3 circumstance bonus on a critical hit). @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.jMQi2kDirzGgddti]{Effect: Divine Rebuttal}

EmblazonAntimagic.WeaponNote: 当武器的持用者使用其造成重击时，他可以尝试反制目标身上的一个法术，使用他等级的一半作为反制等级，向上取整。在这次反制尝试后，刻印圣徽立即消失。

ReplenishmentOfWar.Note: When you damage a creature with a Strike using your deity's favored weapon, you gain a number of temporary Hit Points equal to half your level, or equal to your level if the Strike was a critical hit. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.BJc494USeyM011p3]{Effect: Replenishment of War}

RestorativeStrike.Note: 你可以选择另一个自愿生物，为其治疗等同于该法术为你治疗的相同生命值。若该生物邻接于你命中的敌人，即使其在法术正常射程之外，你也可以将其选做治疗的目标。

SacredGround.Harmful: A creature that remains in the area for the entire 10 minutes regains @Damage[(@actor.level)[void,healing]|traits:healing,void]{Hit Points} equal to your level. This activity has the healing and void traits and heals undead creatures (or other creatures with void healing).
SacredGround.Healing: A creature that remains in the area for the entire 10 minutes regains @Damage[(@actor.level)[vitality,healing]|traits:healing,vitality]{Hit Points} equal to your level. This activity has the healing and vitality traits and heals living creatures.

SapLife.Note: When you cast a harm spell and damage at least one living creature, you regain @Damage[(@item.rank)[healing]] Hit Points.

SharedReplenishment.Note: 你可以将战时补给赋予的临时生命值给予10尺内的一个盟友，代替自己获得。

Concealed.Ignore: 你无视目标的隐蔽状态。

Sickened.AllowEatOrDrink: 你可以在恶心状态下进食和饮水。

Reduce.criticalSuccess: When you critically succeed at a Fortitude save to reduce your @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened} value, you reduce it by 3.
Reduce.success: When you succeed at a Fortitude save to reduce your @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened} value, you reduce it by 2.

RiteOfPassage.Note: 当你在森林中的狭窄地表和不平整地表使用特技技能进行保持平衡动作时，并在检定中成功时，能得到大成功的结果。

ContinualRecovery.Note: 在治疗伤势时，你的伤患只会免疫治疗伤势10分钟而非1小时。此效果只应用于你的治疗伤势行动，伤患接受的其它治疗伤势不受影响。

Convergent.Tactics: 一位有统合战术能力的盟友在目标的触及范围内。

CorrosiveBody.Note: The first time each round that you deal acid damage to a creature in this way, you gain temporary Hit Points. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.IUxQCyO3EXSkId5F]{Spell Effect: Corrosive Body (Temp HP)}
CorrosiveBody.Note9th: The first time each round that you deal acid damage to a creature in this way, you gain [[/r 5d6 #Temporary Hit Points]]{5d6 temporary Hit Points}

LingeringBreath.Description: When you use Breath of the Dragon, the area of your breath becomes difficult terrain for 1 minute. In addition, a creature who fails or critically fails its saving throw takes @Damage[2d6[persistent,@actor.flags.system.dragonblood.damageType]] damage of the same type

ScalyHide.BracersOfArmor: 复鳞皮肤 w/ 力场手环
ScalyHide.ExplorersClothing: 复鳞皮肤 w/ 探险者服装
ScalyHide.MageArmor: 复鳞皮肤 w/ 法术护甲

Description.Base: You have developed your magical breath. You expel the dragonet breath associated with your heritage. Dragonet Breath gains the traits listed in parentheses, and the DC is your class DC or spell DC, whichever is higher. After you use Dragonet Breath, you can't use it again for [[/r 1d4 #Recharge Dragonet Breath]]{1d4 rounds}.
Description.FeyDragonet: **Fey Dragonet** (arcane, poison) You breathe a @Template[type:cone|distance:15] of euphoric gas. Each creature in the area must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell|options:area-effect,inflicts:stupefied|traits:arcane,poison] save or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round.
Description.HomingDrake: **Homing Drake** (acid) You expel a @Template[type:line|distance:30] of caustic spittle that deals @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d4[acid]|options:area-damage] damage with a @Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic|options:area-effect,damage:material:silver|traits:acid] save. At 3rd level and every 2 levels thereafter, the damage increases by 1d4.
Description.HouseDrake: **House Drake** (arcane, mental) You breathe out a cloud of silver mist in a @Template[type:cone|distance:15] that deals @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d4[mental]|options:area-damage] damage with a @Check[will|against:class-spell|options:area-effect|traits:arcane,mental] save. It counts as silver for the purpose of weaknesses. At 3rd level and every 2 levels thereafter, the damage increases by 1d4.
Description.PearlDragonet: **Pearl Dragonet** (arcane, curse) You breathe a @Template[type:cone|distance:15] of golden mist that alters the luck of creatures caught in it. Each time you use Dragonet Breath, decide if it gives good luck or bad luck. Any creature affected by your Dragonet Breath becomes temporarily immune to it for 1 hour. If your breath gives good luck, each creature in the area gains a +1 status bonus to its next attack roll or skill check before the start of your next turn. If your breath gives bad luck, each creature in the area must attempt a @Check[will|against:class-spell|options:area-effect|traits:arcane,curse] save. A creature that fails its save takes a –1 status penalty to its next attack roll or skill check before the start of your next turn. On a critical failure, the creature must instead roll twice and take the worse result on the check; this is a misfortune effect.
Description.TidepoolDragonet: **Tidepool Dragonet** (fire) You breathe a @Template[type:line|distance:15] of superheated gas that deals @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d4[fire]|options:area-damage] damage with a @Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic|options:area-effect|traits:fire] save. At 3rd level and every 2 levels thereafter, the damage increases by 1d4. You can use your breath underwater even though it has the fire trait. If you do, it gains the water trait and emerges as a @Template[type:cone|distance:20] of boiling water.

PlundererOfTheHivesRiches.CriticalSpecialization: 当你的打击重击时，蜂蜜的味道充满你的口腔，你掠夺了敌人部分命能，获得等同于该生物等级一半的临时生命值，持续1分钟。
PlundererOfTheHivesRiches.Description: When you Spark Transcendence, a mass of buzzing insects fill the air around you, granting you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealment} until the beginning of your next turn.

RestlessAsTheTide.CriticalSpecialization: 当你在一次打击中大成功时，水流冲击目标与周围。这对目标与10尺范围内所有生物造成武器伤害骰数量的钝击溅射伤害。这个效果具有水特征。
RestlessAsTheTide.Description: When you Spark Transcendence, you can Step, your body carried along by a surging tide. If your transcendence affected an enemy, you can instead move that enemy 5 feet in a direction of your choice unless it succeeds at a @Check[fortitude|against:exemplar] save against your class DC. If you move an enemy who started out adjacent to you, you can Step into the space it vacated.

TeacherOfHeroes.Description: 在你神火解放后，你可以以自由动作尝试对一个你能看见的生物进行一次回忆知识检定，并立即将你获得的任何知识传递给60尺内的每个盟友。当你以这种方式回忆知识时，你获得的第一项知识总是敌人的免疫（如果有的话）或最高的抗力（如果他没有免疫）。如果目标没有免疫或抗力，那么你会得知他最高的弱点。如果目标没有免疫、抗力或弱点，那么你可以了解他最低的豁免是哪一个。

TheBrave.Description: 你的身体带着你前进，使你可以以一个自由动作向你选择的一个敌人直线行走至多你的一半速度。一旦你对某个敌人使用该能力，你在10分钟内不能再次对同一个敌人使用该能力。

TheCunning.Description: After you Spark Transcendence, you can @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{Create a Diversion} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.QNAVeNKtHA0EUw4X]{Feint} as a free action.

TheDeft.Description: 当你神火解放时，你可以自由动作交互以装填或取出一件武具神迹，这可以发生在你进行解放动作之前或之后。该武器必须是具有装填特征的远程武器或带有投掷特征的单手近战武器。

TheLastRuler.Description: After you Spark Transcendence, you can exude an air of authority until the start of your next turn. If any enemy fails at an attack roll against you during this time, you can attempt an Intimidation check to [[/act demoralize]] that enemy as a free action as you rebuke it for its foolish attempt to stand against your authority.

TheMournful.Description: After you Spark Transcendence, your act resonates with bittersweet poignancy, making one enemy of your choice within 30 feet who witnessed the act @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} as tears or memories dance in their eyes. This is an emotion and mental effect. The enemy remains dazzled until the start of your next turn, and then they are temporarily immune for 10 minutes.

TheProud.Description: 在你神火解放后，你可以吸引30尺内一个敌人的注意，这个效果有听觉，心灵、情绪、预言特征。直到你下回合开始，目标在对你以外的生物进行攻击、伤害、技能检定上获得-1状态减值，但对你进行这些检定时获得+1状态加值。

TheRadiant.Description: After you Spark Transcendence, you inspire an ally within 30 feet to push on, restoring Hit Points equal to @Damage[(2*(1+@actor.level))[healing]]{2 + double your level}; this is a mental and emotion effect. The ally is then temporarily immune for 10 minutes.

ThiefOfMoonlight.Description: After you Spark Transcendence, as a free action you can attempt a check to [[/act palm-an-object]] or to [[/act steal]] an item from an enemy within 30 feet. The relocated objects simply disappear and reappear in your hand.

TrespasserInDeathsRealm.CriticalSpecialization: When you critically succeed at a Strike, you pull your target closer to death from your stolen connection. The target must attempt a @Check[will|against:exemplar|traits:curse] saving against your class DC. On a failure, they become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} for 1 minute. This has the curse trait.
TrespasserInDeathsRealm.Description: When you Spark Transcendence, your divine spark draws part of death closer to you. Until the start of your next turn, any living enemy that starts it turns adjacent to you or enters a space adjacent to you takes @Damage[1d6[void]] damage.

WhoseCryIsThunder.CriticalSpecialization: When you critically succeed on a Strike, the target must make a @Check[fortitude|against:exemplar|traits:sonic] saving throw against your class DC. On a failure, they are knocked @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened} for 1 minute. This is a sonic effect.
WhoseCryIsThunder.Description: When you Spark Transcendence, you can choose to become electrically charged until the start of your next turn. Any creature that touches you or damages you with an unarmed attack or non-reach melee weapon while you're charged takes @Damage[1d6[electricity]] damage as lightning courses back to them. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.nP3k4N52NzrR3KKf]{Effect: Whose Cry is Thunder}

EternityIncineratingBlaze.Label: 燃尽时光之焰
EternityIncineratingBlaze.Note: Whenever you score a critical hit with the imbued ikon, the target becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{Doomed 1} or increases its doomed condition by 1. If the target's maximum dying value is reduced to 0 by this ability, it immediately dies in a flash of spiritual fire that reduces its body to ash.

HurlAtTheHorizon.Note: 武器的投掷距离增加10尺。

BarrowsEdge.Label: 荒冢神锋
BarrowsEdge.RollOptionLabel: 荒冢神锋 — 目标生物的当前生命值低于其最大生命一半

Physical.Prompt: 哪个物品会成为你的神迹？
Physical.UnarmedOrWeapon: 你的神迹是无武装攻击或武器吗？

ShadowSheath.Label: 影鞘
ShadowSheath.LoadNote: 你可以花费一分钟准备将符合影鞘需求的武器装入鞘中。

CrashAgainstMe.Label: 万毁难敌此身
CrashAgainstMe.Note: If a creature attacking you using a weapon dealing the same damage type as your resistance misses you or hits you but deals no damage due to your resistance, the weapon clangs wildly off your skin. This painful reverberation makes the attacking enemy off-guard and gives it a –2 circumstance penalty to attacks with that weapon until the start of the enemy's next turn. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.sEWwGSuXxcTl020D]{Effect: Crash Against Me (Clang)}

InfiniteBladesCelestialArrow.Label: 万刃天箭
InfiniteBladesCelestialArrow.Note: Whenever you successfully Strike an enemy with your weapon ikon, up to two enemies adjacent to the target take @Damage[@item.system.damage.dice@item.system.damage.die[spirit]] damage as they are struck by duplicated missiles.

RejoinInFlight.RollOptionLabel: 燕迹翔聚 — 额外武器伤害骰

MatedBirdsInPairedFlight.Single: 有复数副本的单个武具神迹。

SevenColoredCosmicBridge.Label: 虹宇飞桥
SevenColoredCosmicBridge.Note: 当你成功打击一个敌人时，你可以以一个自由动作传送到10尺内的一个无人占据的位置。

ShiftImmanence.Note: 你投掷先攻时，你可以用一个自由动作使用固有转移。

Sunwrecker.Label: 熄日者
Sunwrecker.Note: 当使用该武器造成重击时，它会以目标为中心创造一个2环黑暗术效果。

ExemplaryFinisher.Battledancer: 你可以在完成终结后立即以一个自由动作进行一次快步。
ExemplaryFinisher.Braggart: If the foe was temporarily immune to your @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize}, their temporary immunity ends.
ExemplaryFinisher.Fencer: The foe is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until your next turn.
ExemplaryFinisher.Name: 惩戒终结
ExemplaryFinisher.Rascal: The foe takes a -10 circumstance penalty to its speed until the start of your next turn. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.fgz7lwg1xHsVW4dX]{Effect: Exemplary Finisher (Rascal)}
ExemplaryFinisher.Wit: The foe takes a -2 circumstance penalty to attack rolls against you until the start of your next turn. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.cu10OjQUdY0a9gpj]{Effect: Exemplary Finisher (Wit)}

ExorcistDedication.SpiritDwelling: 你的精神居所里住着一个灵魂

LightningRingsOvercharge.Prompt: 灵伴贤士本回合是否施展了具有气或电击特征的法术？

FanesFourberie.Prompt: 将卡牌当作飞镖或匕首？

BespellStrikes.Oracle: 你抽取法术能量注入你握持的一件武器，或是你的一项无武装攻击，比如拳头。直到你回合结束，武器或无武装攻击造成一个额外的 1d6 力场伤害，并且如果其未拥有神术特征，则会获得此特征。如果法术造成不同类型伤害，则打击取而代之造成此类型伤害（如果法术造成多种类型伤害，则由你选择其中之一）。
BespellStrikes.Requirements: 你最近一个动作是释放一个非戏法的法术
BespellStrikes.Sorcerer: 你从上一个法术中汲取残余的能量注入你所持握的一把武器或是你的一种无武装攻击中。直到你的回合结束时为止，该武器或无武装攻击造成额外1d6点力场伤害并获得你血脉的魔法根源的特征。如果你施放的法术造成其他种类的伤害，则打击取而代之造成该种类的伤害（如果法术能够造成复数种类的伤害，由你选择一种伤害类型适用）。
BespellStrikes.Wizard: 你抽取法术能量注入你握持的一件武器，或是你的一项无武装攻击，比如拳头。直到你回合结束，武器或无武装攻击造成一个额外的 1d6 力场伤害，并且如果其未拥有奥术特征，则会获得此特征。如果法术造成不同类型伤害，则打击取而代之造成此类型伤害（如果法术造成多种类型伤害，则由你选择其中之一）。

CavaliersBanner.Label: 骑兵旗帜 - 对抗恐惧效果

CharmingLiar.Note: 当你用说谎行动取得大成功时，目标对你的态度改善一级，如同你用交涉技能建立印象成功。

ExperiencedProfessional.Note: 若你在学识技能上的熟练度达到专家，你赚取收入检定失败时可获得的收入翻倍，原本结果为大失败的情况除外。

FastRecovery.Note: 你每次对持续中的疾病或毒素强韧豁免成功时，使其阶段降低2，对于恶性疾病或毒素则降低1。你每次对持续中的疾病或毒素强韧豁免大成功时，使其阶段降低3，对于恶性疾病或毒素则降低2。

Forager.Note: 在使用生存技能求生时，若你的检定结果比成功更糟，改为获得成功。你可以为多个生物提供足以维生的生存条件。

Greenwatcher.Note: Whenever you critically succeed on a Strike against a fey creature, the target is immediately subject to the effects of a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.HRb2doyaLtaoCfi3]{Faerie Fire} spell. For the purposes of counteracting this effect, it's an innate 2nd-rank primal spell.

IncredibleFamiliar.Animist: 你与你的精魄之间的联系以及你对精魂魔法的掌握达到了新的高度，让你可以将更多的力量注入到你允许它作为你魔宠的实体形态中。你每天可以选择六种魔宠和主人能力，而非四种。
IncredibleFamiliar.Thaumaturge: 通过利用每个魔法根源中最精华的部分，你找到了一种方法可以为你的魔宠提供比其他魔宠还要更多的能力。你每天可以选择6个魔宠或主人能力，而非4个。

Witch.Description: 你的魔宠比其他魔宠灌注了更多的魔力。你每天可以选择6个魔宠能力或主人能力，而非4个。
Witch.Special: 将你因成为女巫而获得的奖励魔宠能力加到这个数额上。

IntensifiedElementStance.RollOptionLabel: 劲能调息 — 对构装体的伤害

KnowItAll.Bard: 当你在一次回忆知识的检定中成功，你获得关于给定主体的额外信息或上下文。当你在一次回忆知识的检定中大成功，根据GM的判断，你可能能获得比平常还要多的额外信息或上下文。
KnowItAll.Thaumaturge: 你听闻过每条传言或书本中的故事，你明白，如果你一开始就听说了某件事，你可能早就充分地听说过了。当你在一次回忆知识的检定中成功，你获得关于给定主体的额外信息或上下文。当你在一次回忆知识的检定中大成功，根据GM的判断，你可能能获得比平常还要多的额外信息或上下文。

LegendaryCodebreaker.Note: If you Decipher Writing at the normal rate, and you roll a success, you get a critical success; if you critically succeed while spending the normal amount of time, you gain a nearly word-for-word understanding of the document.

LightningSwap.Exemplar: 你熟悉如何快速切换战斗方式以及对应的武器，这对有多个武器神迹的特别有用。你交互以将手中任意数量的物品储存起来，然后拔出至多两把武器或一把武器与一面盾牌。
LightningSwap.Fighter: 你练习过快速切换战斗风格和所需装备。你可以通过交动作将手中任意数量的物品收起，然后最多拿出两把武器或一面盾牌一把武器。

PeerBeyond.Note: 如果你知道当前出现的虚体不死生物和作祟是什么，你能以魂魄学识或作祟学识进行先攻检定。

QuickClimb.Note: 你获得成功结果时多移动5尺，大成功时多移动10尺，最多不超过你的速度。

QuickSwim.Note: 你获得成功结果时多游泳5尺，大成功时多游泳10尺，最多不超过你的速度。

RiskySurgery.Note: When you Treat Wounds, you can deal @Damage[1d8[slashing]] damage to your patient just before applying the effects of the Treat Wounds. If you do, gain a +2 circumstance bonus to your Medicine check to Treat Wounds, and if you roll a success, you get a critical success instead.

SkillfulTail.Geniekin: You were born with a tail, and with practice you've learned how to perform simple Interact actions with it, such as opening an unlocked door. Your tail can't perform actions that require fingers or significant manual dexterity, including any action that would require a check to accomplish, and you can't use it to hold items.
SkillfulTail.Nephilim: You've always had a tail, but with practice, you've learned to use it for more than signaling your mood. You can perform simple Interact actions with your tail, such as opening an unlocked door. Your tail can't perform actions that require fingers or significant manual dexterity, including any action that would require a check to accomplish, and you can't use it to hold items.

SolarRejuvenation.Ghoran: The warmth and light of the sun gives you life. If you rest outdoors for 10 minutes during the day, you regain Hit Points equal to your @Damage[(floor(@actor.level/2)*@actor.abilities.con.mod)[healing]]{Constitution modifier × half your level}. You gain this benefit in addition to any healing from @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds}.
SolarRejuvenation.Leshy: If you rest outdoors for 10 minutes during the day, you regain Hit Points equal to your @Damage[(floor(@actor.level/2)*@actor.abilities.con.mod)[healing]]{Constitution modifier × half your level}. You gain this benefit in addition to any healing from @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds}. Leshies whose plant nourishment does not rely on photosynthesis require a similarly suitable environment. For example, fungus leshies need dark, damp environments and a pile of decaying plant matter.

YoureNext.Rogue: After downing a foe, you menace another. Attempt to [[/act demoralize options=youre-next]] a creature within 60 feet, with a +2 circumstance bonus. If you have legendary proficiency in Intimidation, you can use this as a free action with the same trigger.
YoureNext.Swashbuckler: After downing a foe, you promise another that you're coming after them next. Attempt an Intimidation check with a +2 circumstance bonus to [[/act demoralize options=youre-next]] a single creature that you can see and that can see you. If you're legendary in Intimidation, you can use this as a free action with the same trigger.

DeepFetchling.Prompt: 选择要抵抗的伤害类型

LightlessLitheness.Note: 你可以进行快步，取代原本行走最多5尺的效果。

DazingBlow.Note:
If the Strike hits, the creature must attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:class|traits:incapacitation] save against your class DC; this is an incapacitation effect.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2}.

Critical Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 3}.

CoatingOfSlime.CriticalHit: On a critical hit, the target takes @Damage[1d4[persistent,acid]] damage.

LivingWeapon.Prompt: 选择用作武器的身体部位。

MutateWeapon.Target: 选择一个你的肢体武器

FollowTheExpert.Prompt: 选择专家的技能熟练度

FortificationLikeEffect.Fortification: 如果你的护甲有护命或高等护命符文，你骰一次纯骰检定。
FortificationLikeEffect.Fourteen: Each time you're critically hit, attempt a @Check[flat|dc:14|showDC:all]. On a success, it becomes a normal hit.
FortificationLikeEffect.Ten: Each time you're critically hit, attempt a @Check[flat|dc:10|showDC:all]. On a success, it becomes a normal hit.
FortificationLikeEffect.Twelve: Each time you're critically hit, attempt a @Check[flat|dc:12|showDC:all]. On a success, it becomes a normal hit.

FrenziedRevelry.Note: Whenever someone benefitting from this bonus critically succeeds at a saving throw against an enemy's mental effect, its revelry increases, granting it a +1 status bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls for 1 round. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.ldl1aU5ovTQMUHJ2]{Spell Effect: Frenzied Revelry (Critical)}

GameHunterDedication.TargetHuntedPrey: 目标是你的猎杀目标（仅限动物、魔兽或龙）
GameHunterDedication.SuccessAttack: When you succeed at a Strike against your hunted prey while it's off-guard, it must attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:class] save against your class DC. On a failure, the prey's Speeds are each reduced by 10 feet for 1 round; on a critical failure, the duration of this effect is 1 minute. The prey is then temporarily immune to this effect for 10 minutes. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.eTosCwuCMf09fYYH]{Effect: Game Hunter (Failure)} @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.lfbDqyKUMssoxUTZ]{Effect: Game Hunter (Critical Failure)}

Irrepressible.SaveNote: 当你在对抗情绪或恐惧效果的豁免中骰出成功时，你改为获得大成功。

TerrainAttunement.Aquatic: 若你在水中，则获得等同于你的陆上速度的游泳速度。若你在地面上，则暂时会有水浪跟随你移动，允许你用自己的游泳速度——若你有的话——作为你的陆上速度来移动。此效果持续1轮。
TerrainAttunement.Arctic: Enemies must attempt a @Check[fortitude] save. They take a –5-foot status penalty to their Speeds for 2 rounds (–10-foot on a critical failure).
TerrainAttunement.Desert: Enemies must attempt a @Check[fortitude] save. On a failure, they're @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} until they drink water or another potable liquid.
TerrainAttunement.Forest: Branches and vines reach out to get in your foes' way. Enemies must attempt a @Check[reflex] save. On a failure, they become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} for 1 round (@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} on a critical failure).
TerrainAttunement.Gravelands: 你在对抗作祟和不死生物能力和法术的豁免骰上获得+1状态加值，持续1轮。
TerrainAttunement.Label: 地形同调
TerrainAttunement.Mountain: 你获得对抗物理伤害的抗力（精金除外），数值等同于法术环级，持续1轮。
TerrainAttunement.Plains: 你获得临时生命值，数值等同于法术环级，持续1轮。
TerrainAttunement.Sky: 你能够飞行至多10尺。若你在回合结束时位于空中，而且你并不具有飞行速度，则会坠落。
TerrainAttunement.Swamp: Affected foes take @Damage[(max(1,floor(@item.level/2)))[persistent,poison]] damage with a @Check[fortitude|basic] save.
TerrainAttunement.Underground: 在1轮内，你获得黑暗视觉以及15尺范围的模糊震颤感知。

SickeningBite.criticalSuccess: When you critically hit a creature with your jaws, the creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}. This is a disease effect.
SickeningBite.success: You can end your satiation to make the target @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}

GrimInsight.SaveNote: When you roll a success on a saving throw against a fear effect, you get a critical success instead, and the source of the fear effect is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} to you until the end of your next turn.

ChosenOfLamashtu.Prompt: 选择一个地精族裔传承

CityScavenger.EarnIncome: 城镇拾荒者 - 赚取收入

ExtraSquishy.Note: 在挤入时，若你的检定成功，改为获得大成功。

RecklessAbandon.Note: 若你对抗有害效果的豁免检定失败或大失败，改为获得成功。

TorchGoblin.Note: As long as you are suffering persistent fire damage, all your melee attacks against adjacent creatures deal an additional @Damage[1[fire]]{1 fire damage} per weapon damage die.

Twitchy.InitiativeToggle: 神经兮兮— 对手使用欺骗或交涉决定先攻
Twitchy.TOTMToggle: 神经兮兮 — 对抗危害

DivineInvulnerability.IncreasedResistanceToggle: 神性无瑕 — 增加抗力

Godling.DomainDamageDropdown: 神种 — 领域伤害类型

StymieTheGods.BonusToggle: 绝地天通 — 对抗跨位面生物

GoldenBladeOfMzali.ElementalFormLabel: 你已通过玛扎利黄金之刃施放元素形态
GoldenBladeOfMzali.LitLabel: 玛扎利黄金之刃正在发光
GoldenBladeOfMzali.PersistentDamageNote: 与通常情况不同的是，一名生物只需要成功通过一次纯骰检定，便能摆脱上述效果所带来的两种持续伤害。

ClayFist.Label: 陶拳
ClayFist.Note: When you make an unarmed Strike with your clay fist and hit, your target takes a -2 status penalty to saving throws against curse effects for 1 hour. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.bvk5rwYSoTtz8QGf]{Effect: Accursed Clay Fist}

Execution.Note: If you hit, your condemned foe takes an extra @Damage[(8d6[precision])[@item.system.damage.damageType]] damage with a @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell|basic] save. If the condemned foe is reduced to 0 Hit Points by the execution and requires a head to live, they die.

HarshJudgement.SeekCondemnedFoeLabel: 严厉审判 - 搜索死刑犯

ArmorBreak.ToggleLabel: 装甲爆破 - 减少壁垒加值

Bodyguard.ToggleLabel: 贴身护卫 - 对保护对象的敌对动作

EnergyInterceptor.Addendum: 除了物理伤害外，你还能够在盟友承受酸蚀、寒冷、电击、火焰或音波伤害时使用拦截攻击。

PunishingShove.Note: When you successfully Shove a creature, that creature takes @Damage[(@actor.abilities.str.mod + @actor.skills.athletics.rank*(@actor.skills.athletics.rank - 1))[bludgeoning]] damage (or @Damage[(2*(@actor.abilities.str.mod + @actor.skills.athletics.rank*(@actor.skills.athletics.rank - 1)))[bludgeoning]] damage on a critical success).

RaiseHaft.ToggleLabel: 擎柄格挡 - 武器已有格挡特征

Taunt.Label: 嘲讽
Taunt.Note: If you take a hostile action that includes at least one of the guardian's allies but doesn't include them, you also become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until the start of your next turn.

FinalShot.Note: Regardless of your roll, after the attack you're @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until the start of your next turn and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

SwordAndPistol.MeleeNote: When you make a successful melee Strike against an enemy with your one-handed melee weapon, the next ranged Strike you make against that enemy with a one-handed firearm or one-handed crossbow doesn't trigger reactions that would trigger on a ranged attack but not a melee attack, such as Reactive Strike. This benefit is lost if not used by the end of your next turn.
SwordAndPistol.RangedNote: When you make a successful ranged Strike against an enemy within your reach with your one-handed firearm or one-handed crossbow, that enemy is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} against your next melee attack with a one-handed melee weapon. This benefit is lost if not used by the end of your next turn.
SwordAndPistol.RollOptionLabel: Sword and Pistol — Enemy is within reach

EarnedGlory.Note: 当你尝试表演检定来对一名精灵进行建立印象动作时，若检定结果为大失败，则使用失败作为替代。

Halfling.GuidingLuck: 你每天你可以使用半身人幸运两次：一次响应其正常的触发条件，另一次则与正常条件不同，只能在察觉或攻击检定失败时触发。

IncredibleLuck.Base: 你可以每小时使用1次半身人幸运，而不是1天1次。
IncredibleLuck.GuidingLuck: 如果你有幸运指引专长，你依旧只能以每日一次的频率在察觉检定或攻击检定失败时使用半身人幸运。（不过你可以在你使用半身人幸运的同一个小时里使用幸运指引）
IncredibleLuck.SharedLuck: 如果你有分享幸运专长，你依旧只能以每日一次的频率给你的盟友使用半身人幸运。

Innocuous.Note: 即使你在分神的欺骗检定中失败，只要不是大失败，类人生物就不会意识到你在试图忽悠他们。

KeenEyes.Label: 搜索30尺内的藏匿或无踪生物

SharedLuck.Base: 你可以在30尺内的盟友技能检定或是豁免检定失败时使用半身人幸运，让盟友而不是你重投这个失败的检定。就像通常的那样，你的盟友必须使用新的结果，即使那比他们第一次骰点结果要差也是。
SharedLuck.GuidingLuck: 如果你拥有幸运指引专长，你不能在使用共享幸运为盟友增益时使用幸运指引来重投盟友的攻击检定或是察觉检定。

SureFeet.BalanceNote: 如果你在一次用以保持平衡的特技检定中投出了成功，那么将它视为大成功。而且当你尝试保持平衡时，不会陷入措手不及状态。
SureFeet.ClimbNote: 如果你在一次用以攀爬的运动检定中投出了成功，那么将它视为大成功。而且当你尝试攀爬时，不会陷入措手不及状态。

HarrowChosen.Prompt: 你的牌和你的阵营一致吗？

AncestralMight.FirstBoostPrompt: 选择其中一项族裔属性提升，如果只有自由提升则自选一项。
AncestralMight.SecondBoostPrompt: 选择另一项族裔属性提升，如果只有自由提升则跳过。

AuraOfProtection.SpellRankPrompt: 选择你刚刚施法的环级。

CalledFoe.Note: 该效果一直持续到你的下个回合结束，或直到你对指定敌人打出重击（以最先出现的结果为准）。

CriticalMoment.Note: If you still fail this check, you become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{Doomed 1}.

DesperateSwing.Note: If the attack fails, you release your weapon, or drop @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} if you were using an unarmed attack or otherwise can't release your weapon.

AgonizingRebuke.Note: When you successfully Demoralize a foe, that foe takes @Damage[(ternary(gte(@actor.system.skills.intimidation.rank,4),3,ternary(gte(@actor.system.skills.intimidation.rank,3),2,1))d4)[mental]]{1d4 mental damage} at the start of each of its turns as long as it remains Frightened and continues to engage in combat with you. If you have master proficiency in Intimidation, the damage increases to 2d4, and if you have legendary proficiency, the damage increases to 3d4.

CantorianReinforcement.Note: 当你在一个抵抗疾病或毒素的豁免骰中获得成功，你的苦难阶段降低2（对于恶性疾病或毒素则降低1），当你获得大成功，阶段降低3（对于恶性的疾病或毒素则降低2）。

SaocAstrology.Prompt: 选择你通过索克占星术动作获得的环境减值或加值

VikingShieldbearer.Prompt: 选择你要获得受训熟练度的武器

WitchWarden.SaveNote: 你在对抗诅咒与由女巫或鬼婆施放的法术而进行的豁免骰中成功时，结果变为大成功。

HuntPrey.FirstHitDamage: 对猎杀目标的第一次打击
HuntPrey.FirstHitSwitch: 本回合第一次命中猎杀目标

Lavasoul.MagmaSpikeCriticalSpecialization: Instead of the normal critical specialization effect, the target takes @Damage[1d6[persistent,fire]] damage; you gain a bonus on this persistent damage equal to your item bonus to attack rolls on unarmed attacks.

ImpeccableFlow.RollOptionLabel: 无暇心流 — 你的任何检定大失败。
ImpeccableFlow.Note: 如果你受此法术影响的任何检定大失败，加值将终止，并且在法术剩余时间内所有检定都有-1状态减值。

BoostModulation.Prompt: 选择一个额外的攻势增压

QuickenedAddendum.Armor: 你永久迅捷。你可以使用额外动作行走，快步或使用一种你的大发明提供的移动形式（例如飞行或游泳）。
QuickenedAddendum.Construct: 你永久迅捷。你可以使用额外动作指挥你的构装体大发明（或如果你要花费2个动作指挥你的构装体，用额外动作来满足其中一个动作）。
QuickenedAddendum.Weapon: 你永久迅捷。你的额外动作可以使用你的大发明进行打击。

Construct.Prompt: 选择一项构装体大发明。

Breakthrough.AllowedDrops: 7级或者更低的发明家职业特性
Breakthrough.EnhancedResistancePrompt: 选择要增强的初始改修。

Revolutionary.AllowedDrops: 不高于15级的发明家职业特性
Revolutionary.EnhancedResistancePrompt: 选择要增强的初始改进。

Overdrive.CriticalFailure: Whoops! Something explodes. You take @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level / 2))[@actor.flags.system.inventor.explode]|immutable|name:PF2E.SpecificRule.Inventor.Innovation.MalfunctionDamage] damage, and you can't use Overdrive again for [[/r 1d4 #Recharge Overdrive]]{1d4 rounds} as your gizmos reset.
Overdrive.CriticalSuccess: Your gizmos go into a state of incredible efficiency called critical @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.1XlJ9xLzL19GHoOL]{Overdrive}, adding great power to your attacks.
Overdrive.Failure: Your gizmos whine concerningly and begin to smoke. Your Strikes deal 1 additional fire damage. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.1XlJ9xLzL19GHoOL]{Overdrive}
Overdrive.Success: Your gizmos go into @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.1XlJ9xLzL19GHoOL]{Overdrive}, adding power to your attacks.

Unstable.FailureNote: 大发明无法继续使用不稳定动作。作为大发明的创造者，你可以花费10分钟再调校你的大发明，让它能够正常工作，之后你就可以使用大发明再次进行不稳定动作。

FlatCheck.CriticalFailure: The innovation becomes incapable of being used for further unstable actions, and you also take @Damage[(floor(@actor.level / 2))[@actor.flags.system.inventor.explode]|immutable|name:PF2E.SpecificRule.Inventor.Innovation.MalfunctionDamage] damage. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.olpkQDGDzmYZCvQH]{Effect: Unstable Check Failure}
FlatCheck.Failure: The innovation becomes incapable of being used for further unstable actions. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.olpkQDGDzmYZCvQH]{Effect: Unstable Check Failure}
FlatCheck.Label: 不稳定检定

Unstable.Note: When you take an unstable action, attempt a @Check[flat|dc:resolve(ternary(lt(@actor.skills.crafting.rank,4),15,13))|options:unstable-check|name:PF2E.SpecificRule.Inventor.Unstable.FlatCheck.Label|showDC:all] immediately after applying its effects.

CertainStratagem.Note: You deal half of your @Damage[(floor((@actor.level+3)/4)d6[precision])[@item.system.damage.damageType]|options:certain-stratagem]{Strategic Strike damage} to the target

DetectivesReadiness.ClueInAddendum: 你在追查方向上获得的加值，可以用在对抗与调查的核心问题相关的生物或效果的豁免中。

JustTheFacts.QuickenedAddendum: 你永久迅捷且可以用额外动作来回忆知识。

PursueALead.Label: 追查方向 — 调查加值

SharedStratagem.Note: The creature you hit is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} to a designated ally on the next attack the ally makes against the creature before the start of your next turn.

IivlarsBoundaryBreak.DescriptionAddendum: 当你维持此法术时，你传送的距离增加至15尺。

JotunsHeart.ToggleLabel: 巨人雄心 - 增加武器或拳头的触及

KeepPace.BountyHunter: When your hunted prey tries to bolt, you follow. You Stride up to your Speed, following your hunted prey and keeping it in reach throughout its movement until it stops moving or you've moved your full Speed. You can use Keep Pace to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.H6v1VgowHaKHnVlG]{Burrow}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.pprgrYQ1QnIDGZiy]{Climb}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cS9nfDRGD83bNU1p]{Fly}, or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.c8TGiZ48ygoSPofx]{Swim} instead of Stride if you have the appropriate movement type.
KeepPace.GameHunter: Once you are upon your prey, they can't escape. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Bcxarzksqt9ezrs6]{Stride} up to your Speed, following the foe and keeping it in reach throughout its movement until it stops moving or you've moved your full Speed. You can use Keep Pace to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.H6v1VgowHaKHnVlG]{Burrow}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.pprgrYQ1QnIDGZiy]{Climb}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cS9nfDRGD83bNU1p]{Fly}, or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.c8TGiZ48ygoSPofx]{Swim} instead of Stride if you have the corresponding movement type.
KeepPace.Trigger: 你的猎物在你的触及范围内，并且正在尝试远离你。

Proliferate.Title: 增殖
Proliferate.Description: 你使一个存在的元素扩张。这类似于生成（Generate）选项，与之不同的是你可以有以下选择：在其源头或相邻方格中创造相同数量的元素，或让元素扩张以填充它所在的方格（例如让火苗更旺盛或让小树枝变为树苗）。在你增殖某种元素之后，它会对环境做出自然反应——例如，在空气稀薄环境中增殖的水会四处飞溅。只能影响自然形式的元素，不能影响持久的、人造的物品。

Regulate.Title: 调节
Regulate.Description: You change the temperature of an existing element, making it colder or warmer. This can snuff out a flame or turn water to ice or steam. After this change, the element cools or warms naturally unless you Sustain the impulse. An item that gets cold or hot enough (as determined by the GM) can be used as an improvised weapon that deals @Damage[1[cold]] damage or @Damage[1[fire]] damage in addition to the damage the GM determines for the improvised weapon.

Sculpt.Title: 塑形
Sculpt.Description: 你将现有元素重塑为由你设计的小物件。仔细观察，它显得粗糙而不自然。被塑形的元素可以成为一个功能性的短工具（或者长工具，前提是你的基础御术能够影响负载1或以上的元素）。它太脆弱，也不自然，因此不能作为武器，也不具备任何货币价值。

ConductiveSphere.RollOptionLabel: 使用金属物体进行打击

CriticalBlast.Earth: If the target is on the ground, it's knocked @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}; if it isn't on the ground, it descends up to 20 feet (you choose the distance).
CriticalBlast.Fire: 目标受到1d6持续火焰伤害。这次持续伤害增加你涌动攻击骰上的物品加值（比如来自束门环）。
CriticalBlast.Label: 重击冲击
CriticalBlast.Metal: The target takes 1d6 persistent bleed damage; if the creature has the metal trait or is made of metal, it instead takes @Damage[1d6[persistent,untyped]] damage with no type from rust. You gain an item bonus to this persistent damage equal to your item bonus to impulse attack rolls, such as from a gate attenuator.
CriticalBlast.Water: 冲击造成每伤害骰2点溅射伤害，伤害类型不变。
CriticalBlast.Wood: If the target of the critical hit is adjacent to a surface, roots entangle it. The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} and must spend an Interact action to attempt a @Check[athletics|dc:10] check to pull itself free. The target doesn't become stuck if it is incorporeal, is liquid, or could otherwise escape without effort.

ImpulseJunction.Air: 在涌动的其他效果生效之前或之后，你能选择最多以半速进行一次行走，或进行一次快步。如果你拥有飞行速度，你能选择最多以半速飞行。
ImpulseJunction.Earth: Fragments of stone float around you, granting you a +1 circumstance bonus to AC until the start of your next turn. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.09oP0FBBAhXOS4JW]{Effect: Earth Impulse Junction}
ImpulseJunction.Metal: 选择酸蚀、电击或穿刺。直到你的下个回合开始，每当有生物接触你或用无武装攻击、非长触及武器伤害你，他都会受到你等级一半的伤害（最小1点伤害），伤害类型和你之前选择的一致。
ImpulseJunction.Title: 涌动汇流
ImpulseJunction.Water: 在你涌动的其他效果生效之后，你能将涌动瞄准的生物（或涌动区域中的一个生物）向任意方向移动5尺，如果该生物在水体中，则移动10尺。这不能将生物移动到空中。你只能移动自愿的生物、对抗涌动豁免失败的生物、或者你涌动攻击骰成功命中的生物。
ImpulseJunction.Wood: You gain temporary Hit Points equal to your level that last until the start of your next turn. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.rCsmv66TzQhte4Gp]{Effect: Wood Impulse Junction}

Prompt.AuraSize: 为你的御能灵光选择一个范围。

Overflow.Description: When you use an impulse that has the overflow trait, your kinetic aura deactivates until you revitalize it (typically with @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.g8QrV39TmZfkbXgE]{Channel Elements}). You can use only one overflow impulse per round, even if you reactivate your kinetic gate.
Overflow.Title: 满溢

KoboldBreath.Addendum: Creatures that critically fail their save against your Kobold Breath take @Damage[3d4[persistent,damage]].

KoboldBreath.Label: 狗头人吐息
KoboldBreath.Note: Creatures that critically fail their save against your Kobold Breath take @Damage[3d4[@actor.flags.system.draconicExemplar.damageType,persistent]].

DragonsBreath.DescriptionAlteration: You channel your draconic exemplar's power into a gout of energy that manifests as a @Template[line|distance:60] or a @Template[cone|distance:30], dealing @Damage[ceil(@actor.level/2)d8[@actor.flags.system.draconicExemplar.damageType]|options:area-damage] damage. Each creature in the area must attempt a basic saving throw against the higher of your class DC or spell DC. You can't use this ability again for 1 hour.

DragonsPresence.Note: 当你在对抗恐惧效果的豁免检定中掷出成功时，可用大成功替代它。当你在此检定中投掷出失败时，则用大失败替代它。

Dedication.StabilizeNote: When you successfully Administer First Aid to stabilize a dying creature that doesn't yet have the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Yl48xTdMh3aeQYL2]{Wounded} condition, it regains @Damage[(2d8 + 10*max(0,(@actor.system.skills.medicine.rank - 2)))[healing]] Hit Points.
Dedication.StopBleedingNote: When you successfully Administer First Aid to stop bleeding, the target rolls the flat check (with lowered DC for an assisted recovery) twice and takes the better result; this is a fortune effect. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.45nzYsMBTP6PIxDN]{Effect: Lepidstadt Surgeon Dedication (Stop Bleeding)}

Seedpod.Note: On a critical hit, a seedpod bursts, issuing forth a tangle of vegetation that imposes a -10-foot circumstance penalty on the target's Speed for 1 round. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.wQDHpOKY3GZqvS2v]{Effect: Seedpod}

ThornedSeedpod.Note: When you critically succeed at a seedpod Strike, vines twist and stab your foe, dealing @Damage[1d4[persistent,piercing]] damage.

HandOfTheLich.Note: The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} until the end of your next turn unless it succeeds at a @Check[fortitude|against:spell] save against your spell DC.

ParthenogenicHatchling.Note: 每当你针对疾病的豁免检定成功时, 都会使其降低2阶段，恶性疾病则降低1阶段。每个对抗持续疾病的大成功会使其降低3阶段，恶性疾病则降低2阶段。

MagicalShorthand.Note: 若你失败，你可以在一周后或提升一级后再次尝试，以先发生的情况为准。

Spellstrike.RechargeNote: 施放花费至少一个动作的汇聚法术时，你可以再充能你的法术打击。

UnsheathingTheSwordLight.Note: Countless copies of your sword, made of light, fall around you, dealing @Damage[(2*{item|flags.pf2e.rulesSelections.unsheathingTheSwordLight})[@item.system.damage.damageType]|options:area-damage,damage:material:cold-iron,damage:material:silver] damage to each creature within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] of the target, excluding you and the target of the Spellstrike.

RollOptionLabel.Second: 木躯韧心 — 第二个能力

DreadMarshalStance.Title: 恐怖军势灵光

GrievousBlow.Note: 这次攻击可以忽略相当于你的等级数值的物理伤害抗力（包括对某种具体类型的物理伤害抗力）。

MartialProficiency.SimpleMartialTwoHandedMeleeWeapons: 简易&军用双手近战武器

ReefMerfolk.VirulentCriticalSuccessNote: 你将恶性毒素阶段降低2。
ReefMerfolk.VirulentSuccessNote: 你将恶性毒素阶段降低1。

SiphonTorment.Description: 目标生物获得等于你等级的临时生命值

DragonRoar.Label: 第一次攻击惊惧的生物

StunningFist.Note: The target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|against:monk|name:Monk|traits:incapacitation|overrideTraits:true] save against your class DC or be @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1} (or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 3} on a critical failure).

WolfDrag.Note: If the attack succeeds, you knock the target @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.

DivinePresence.OffGuardToggle: 显化圣相 — 让目标措手不及

Multitalented.Prompt: 选择一种兼职入门专长

Note.Base: While the creature is taking this persistent damage, it's also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1}.
Note.FourteenthLevel: While the creature is taking this persistent damage, it's also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1}.
Note.TwentiethLevel: While the creature is taking this persistent damage, it's also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1}.

Flat.Label: 降音
Flat.Note: Whenever the enemy critically fails at a Strike, saving throw, or skill check, they fall @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} in addition to other effects from the critical failure.

Sharp.Label: 升音
Sharp.Note: Whenever an enemy takes piercing or slashing damage, they also take @Damage[2d6[bleed]] damage.

Mythic.PointSpentPrompt: 此能力是否消耗了神话点？

VenomSpit.CriticalNote: The target takes @Damage[(@weapon.system.damage.dice)[persistent,poison]]{persistent poison damage} equal to the number of weapon damage dice
VenomSpit.HoodedNote: The target is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} until the start of your next turn.

Notes.RequirementsNotMet: 生物目前没有满足使用这个能力的需求。

ConduitOfVoidAndVitality.HarmDescription: You cast a 3-action harm spell, expending the slot as normal. If the spell restores Hit Points to one or more creatures, then one creature healed by this spell regains @Damage[(@actor.conditions.cursebound.value)d8[healing,void]|shortLabel:true] additional Hit Points; if the spell damages one or more creatures, then one creature harmed by this spell takes @Damage[(@actor.conditions.cursebound.value)d8[void]|shortLabel:true] additional damage.
ConduitOfVoidAndVitality.HealDescription: You cast a 3-action heal spell, expending the slot as normal. If the spell restores Hit Points to one or more creatures, then one creature healed by this spell regains @Damage[(@actor.conditions.cursebound.value)d8[healing,vitality]|shortLabel:true] additional Hit Points; if the spell damages one or more creatures, then one creature harmed by this spell takes @Damage[(@actor.conditions.cursebound.value)d8[vitality]|shortLabel:true] additional damage.

CurseSeverity.MajorToExtreme: When you cast a revelation spell while affected by your major curse, your curse intensifies to an extreme effect.
