When affected by your extreme curse, you become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{Doomed 2} (or increase your doomed condition by 2 if you were already doomed). Once every 10 minutes, when you fail an attack roll, skill or Perception check, or saving throw, you can reroll it and use the second result. The reroll has the fortune trait and doesn't require you to spend an action, meaning you can use the reroll even if you can't act.
CurseSeverity.MinorToModerate: 如果你在低阶诅咒生效的情况下施放启示法术，则诅咒在你结束施放法术行动之后立即提升至中阶诅咒。
CurseSeverity.MinorToOffGuard: You become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} in addition to the effects of the minor curse.
CurseSeverity.ModerateToMajor: 你在中阶诅咒生效的情况下施放启示法术后，你立即提升至高阶诅咒。
CurseSeverity.NoneToMinor: 在每日准备后，你第一次施放完启示法术完毕后，你的低阶诅咒便显现出来。
CurseSeverity.Overwhelmed: 在你施放启示法术后，你陷入过载状态。当你过载时，你无法施放和维持任何启示法术

Cursebound.IncreaseNote: When you use a cursebound ability, you become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zXZjC8HLaRoLR17U]{Cursebound 1}, or if you already were cursebound, you increase the value of your cursebound condition by 1.
Cursebound.MaximumNote: You can't use a cursebound ability if you are already at your maximum @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zXZjC8HLaRoLR17U]{Cursebound} value.

DiverseMystery.Toggle: 已用的异色秘示域咒缚法术

MeddlingFutures.Note: If you attempt to use a different action, you must succeed at a @Check[flat|dc:6] or the action is lost.

MysteryConduit.Note: 当你施放5环级及更低环且没有持续时间的法术时，可以不消耗法术位，而是如同施放了启示法术一般增长一级诅咒严重性。用该法施放的法术获得咒缚特征。

RevelInRetribution.Label: 纵狂报复
RevelInRetribution.Note: Lashing out at a defenseless enemy invigorates you with the thrill of combat, granting you temporary Hit Points whenever you successfully hit with a Reactive Strike. The temporary Hit Points last for the spell's duration. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.rnkQKEwUxrGruE1e]{Spell Effect: Revel in Retribution (Temp HP)}

HoldMark.Prompt: 选择你的部族印记纹章

OrcWarmask.Prompt: 选择兽人战纹的力量来源。

Organsight.Success: 器官视域 — 医疗检定成功

PackAttack.Label: 目标位于至少两个盟友的射程内

Parry.Prompt: 你的武器有格挡特征吗？

WashOut.Note: 每当你对正在生效的毒素进行豁免成功时，你将其阶段减少2，或将恶性毒的阶段减少1。每当你对正在生效的毒素进行豁免大成功时，你将其阶段减少3，或将恶性毒的阶段减少2。

Prompt.AdvancedMulticlassFeat: 选择一个等级为最多你角色等级一半的职业专长
Prompt.CantripOrNonCantrip: 选择戏法或非戏法法术
Prompt.LevelOneOrTwoClassFeat: 选择一个1或2级职业专长
Prompt.UntamedForm: 选择一种无羁形态效果
Prompt.VersatileTrait: 选择一种多用伤害类型。
Prompt.WeaponDamageDice: Select a number of weapon damage dice.
Prompt.WeaponOrUnarmed: 选择一把武器或无武装打击。

Amp.AstralRain: The area changes to a @Template[burst|distance:5], and you can Sustain the Spell up to 1 minute. The first time each round that you Sustain the Spell, you can move the burst up to 20 feet.
Amp.ContagiousIdea: 你可以选择将思维从第二个目标扩散到第三个目标，其方式与从第一个目标扩散到第二个目标相同。欢愉思维会给予两倍的临时生命值（10，每升一环额外增加2）。

DancingBlade.Base: 武器的攻击强度增加，你的控制也精细到可以应用更高级的技巧。武器攻击的伤害骰子从d6变为d10。当你施展或维持法术时，除了标准选项外，你还可以选择以下选项。

Guard.Text: 该武器不进行攻击，而是为其所跟随的目标提供对近战攻击的AC+2环境加值。该加值持续到你下一回合开始或武器改变对象之前，以先发生者为准。
Guard.Title: 守护

Push.Text: （攻击） 该武器试图推撞其目标，使用你的法术攻击骰而非运动检定来决定推撞的结果。
Push.Title: 推撞

Daze.Base: Your spell cracks the target's mental defenses, leaving it susceptible to further psychic attack. The spell's damage changes to 1d10. If the target fails its Will save, until the end of its next turn, it gains weakness 1 to mental damage and takes a –1 status penalty to Will saves. On a critical failure, the weakness is 3 (in addition to the target being @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}). The weakness applies before daze deals damage.
Daze.Heightened: 失败或大失败的弱点都提升1，法术伤害增加2d10。

DetectMagic.Base: 你侦测魔法的脉冲帮助你感觉到附近魔法的强项或弱点。当你探测到敌人或危害上有魔法存在时，你会在3个回合内获得对来自该敌人或危害的魔法的豁免+1状态加值。如果你在一次施放侦测魔法的过程中发现了多个魔法来源，你将获得对所有这些魔法的加值。
DetectMagic.Heightened: 对魔法的豁免状态加值增加到+2。

Amp.DistortionLens: 透镜不仅可以干涉攻击，还可以干涉生物行动。当一个中体型或更小的盟友生物移动时，它可以移入或移出透镜所在方格而不将该方格计算在总移动距离中。同时，透镜所在方格对你的敌人成为困难地形。
Amp.EntropicWheel: 你在施法时以及在每次熵轮会获得一个微子时获得两个微子而不是一个。
Amp.Figment: 当你增幅法术时，你可以在其正常效果的基础上创建一个特别分散注意力的幻术。选择法术范围内的一个未被占据的方格。该方格中的幻术为在你下一个回合开始前的单次近战攻击提供夹击。如果你维持法术，幻术的细节变化和转移，让你的敌人不安；夹击幻术的持续时间延长到你下一个回合开始，并且你可以将其移动到法术范围内的任何未被占据的方格。已经识破幻术的生物，夹击幻术不能提供其效果。
Amp.ForbiddenThought: Your telepathic push is particularly shocking to those who resist it. If the target fails its save, it's also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.
Amp.ForeseeThePath: 法术在失败时的结果与成功时相同（但在大失败时仍无效果）。每次你维持法术时，你可以选择一个额外的盟友作为目标，给予他们与初始目标盟友相同的增益。

Frostbite.Base: 你隔空汲取热量来补充自己的力量。球体造成3d4寒冷伤害。你获得数值等于你造成伤害的一半的临时生命值（在适用抗力之后）。你会在1分钟后失去这些临时生命。
Frostbite.Heightened: 初始伤害增加2d4而非1d4。大失败的弱点增加1。

GhostlyShift.Base: Your insubstantiality is complete enough that you can pass through other creatures, causing painful interference effects when you do so. Once each round when you Stride, Burrow, Swim, or Fly, you can pass through one creature's space during that action without needing to attempt a check to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.21WIfSu7Xd7uKqV8]{Tumble Through}, though you can't end your turn in its space. When you pass through a creature's space in this way, you deal 2d6 force damage to that creature, with a @Check[fortitude|basic] save.

Guidance.Base: 你可以在关键时刻向你的盟友投射出一闪的洞见，使他们免于失败。增幅的神导术不会导致生物暂时对神导术免疫，而且即使生物暂时对神导术免疫，也可以被增幅神导术作为目标。
Guidance.BaseTwo: 当你的盟友在攻击骰、察觉检定、豁免或技能检定中失败或大失败时，你可以作为触发的反应动作施放一个增幅神导术，而神导术的加值可能会将这次失败变为成功，或将大失败变为普通失败。神导的加值可追溯应用至他们的检定上。

Amp.HologramCage: 构成监牢的力场墙壁获得了实质。监牢墙壁的每个10尺x10尺段落有10AC，两倍于法术等级的硬度以及4倍于法术等级的生命值。如果在你施法时墙壁的任何一段会穿过生物，施法失败。
Amp.HomingBeacon: Choose one creature hit by the spell (if the spell has a spell attack roll) or that fails its save against the spell (if the spell requires a save). A psychic beacon emits from the creature's location, making it easier to notice the creature as the mind and attention of onlookers is subtly drawn to it. For 1 minute, if the target would be @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}, it's instead merely @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}, and if it would be concealed, it's no longer concealed.

Ignition.Base: 你投射纯净的热量，导致目标燃烧。初始伤害变为1d10火焰伤害加上1点火焰溅射伤害。使用增幅的产生火焰作为近战攻击时，将初始伤害的伤害骰从d10增加到d12。你不会受到增幅引火术的溅射伤害。
Ignition.Heightened: 与引火术的正常升阶条目不同，初始伤害增加1d10（近战为1d12），溅射伤害增加1。大失败的持续火焰伤害增加1d4。

ImaginaryWeapon.Base: 你创造多把幻想兵器同时攻击复数敌人。你进行两次幻想兵器攻击，每次选择一个不同的目标。你的多重攻击减值在进行完两次攻击后才会增加。

Amp.InertialBarrier: 你或法术的1个目标获得对物理伤害的抗力，数值等于2+法术环级，直到你的下一回合开始。
Amp.MentalBalm: 你或一个30尺内的盟友在对抗情绪效果的意志豁免上获得+2状态加值，持续1分钟。你也可以尝试利用这个增幅过的心能戏法反制对你或你所选盟友施加惊惧或呆滞状态的效果，只要该呆滞状态的持续时间在1小时或以内。如果你反制成功，你终止了惊惧和呆滞状态，但你不能终止效果可能存在的其他任何部分。

Message.Base: 你心灵感应的信息让你可以在传递情报时协调你和盟友的动作。传讯术的目标可以立刻花费反应进行快步或行走。
Message.Heightened: The target of the message can choose to [[/act shove]], Strike, or [[/act trip]] with its reaction instead.

Amp.MindsLightCirclet: You transfer some of the magical luminescence from the mind's light circlet to one of the creatures. Choose a creature targeted by the spell or in its area. Until the start of your next turn, that creature sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius (and dim light to the next 20 feet) and can't be @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}. If the creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}, it's concealed while alight, rather than being @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected}.

OmnidirectionalScan.Base: 你的扫描非常细致，能够研究出生物可能的强度和弱点。你了解了目标哪个豁免最高，哪个豁免最低，且你和所有30尺内的盟友在针对该生物的攻击和伤害上获得+1环境加值。
OmnidirectionalScan.BaseTwo: 如果你使用通过全向扫描准备的协助反应动作并成功，你所协助的这次攻击的加值提升至+2。在大成功时，该加值提升到+3。如果你有传奇施法熟练，大成功加值提升到+4。

PhaseBolt.Base: Your bolt leaves phase completely, becoming invisible and intangible until it's already embedded in the target—giving the impression it simply teleported itself into place. The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} against the attack. Additionally, the bolt ignores an amount of Hardness or resistance to piercing damage equal to half the spell's rank. On a critical success, the target can't be affected by teleportation effects until the start of your next turn.

RedistributePotential.Base: You can affect the flow of energy on a much grander scale. Instead of two 5-foot squares, you create two @Template[burst|distance:10]{10-foot bursts}. They still must be adjacent to one another and can overlap. A creature in both areas can still be affected by only one of your choice. The spell's damage increases to 6d6. The conditions last for 1 minute.

Amp.RemovePresence: Choose one target of the spell or one creature in its area. If that enemy fails its save or the spell hits it, you become undetected by that creature, disappearing from its senses for 1 minute or until you use a hostile action. This is similar to being @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}, but effects like see the unseen don't reveal you—you're affecting the target's mind, not its vision. _Truesight_ can still see through this illusion if the counteract check succeeds.
Amp.ShatterMind: You increase the area of the spell to a @Template[cone|distance:30] or @Template[cone|distance:60], and the damage dice for the spell change to d10s. Creatures that fail are @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} until the start of your next turn (or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} on a critical failure).
Amp.ShatterSpace: You or one target of the spell are surrounded by a spiral of torn space. This is an aura, and you choose the radius of the emanation, up to 20 feet. A creature that starts its turn in the aura or enters the aura during its turn takes @Damage[(@item.level)d6[slashing]|options:area-damage] damage for every rank of the amped psi cantrip, with a @Check[reflex|basic|options:area-effect] save against your spell DC. If the creature critically fails, the torn space throws it off balance and it falls @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. The aura lasts until the beginning of your next turn. You can choose whether the aura affects the creature emitting it.

Shield.Base: 你创造出三重护盾组成的多层屏障来增强你的防御力。持续时间变为到维持，至多1分钟。护盾在你每个回合开始时仍会撤下，但你可以在维持法术时自动再次举盾。
Shield.BaseTwo: 当你用此法术进行格挡时，三层盾牌中的一层会被打破，你将不再获得AC加成，但法术并没有结束。你可以继续使用该法术，直到最后一层被打破；一旦最后一层破裂，该法术结束，你在10分钟内不能再施放护盾术或增幅护盾术。当你用增幅护盾术进行格挡时，你可以选择破坏多层护盾以提高你的防御力。如果你破坏了两层而不是一层盾，那么盾的格挡硬度会增加到正常值的1.5倍（1级为7，3级为15，5级为22，7级为30，9级为37）。如果你破坏了所有三层，那么硬度将增加到正常值的两倍。
Shield.RollOptionLabel: 护盾术（增幅） — 破坏盾牌格挡的层数

Amp.TargetOfPsychicIre: Choose one target of the spell. Psychic phenomena turn themselves on the target—typically, objects fling themselves at the creature. At the beginning of each of the target's turns, it takes @Damage[(@item.level)d4[bludgeoning]] damage, with a @Check[reflex|against:occult|basic] save. The target remains marked by psychic ire for 3 rounds. The effect persists even if you fall @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} or leave the area.

TelekineticHand.Base: You create a multitude of telekinetic hands that grip onto a creature and move it about. Target a creature of Medium size or smaller with the amped spell instead of an object. You attempt to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{Shove} the target in a direction of your choice, rolling a spell attack roll against its Fortitude DC instead of an Athletics check. The creature takes a –10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds until the spell ends. Starting the round after you Cast the Spell, the first time each round you Sustain the Spell, you can attempt to Shove the creature again.
TelekineticHand.Heightened: You can attempt to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Dt6B1slsBy8ipJu9]{Disarm} the creature instead of attempting to Shove it. If you knock an item out of the creature's grasp in this way, the _telekinetic hand_ immediately grabs it. Any effect of the _telekinetic hand_ on the creature ends, and the spell now carries the item, just like you had picked it up with an unamped _telekinetic hand_.

TelekineticProjectile.Base: 你用更强的力量投掷物品，以飞雹般的射弹将敌人击退。成功时，你将目标从你的方向推离5尺。大成功时，你在造成双倍伤害之外还能将目标推离10尺。

TelekineticRend.Base: Your thoughts expand in scope and power. The bursts deal 1d6 bludgeoning damage and 1d6 slashing damage, instead of the usual damage. A creature that critically fails its save is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.
TelekineticRend.Heightened: 伤害同时提升1d6钝击和1d6挥砍，并追加第三个不重叠的@Template[burst|distance:5]区域。

Amp.TesseractTunnel: 你不再需要物理移动以连接空间中的两点。当你施展超维隧道时，你直接创造一条隧道，其终点是在与你速度相等的射程内的一个方格；你可以选择立即传送到隧道另一端的空间。此外，隧道可以双向穿越，而非只从入口到出口。你可以解消该法术。
Amp.ThermalStasis: 该法术的持续时间变为1分钟。
Amp.VectorScreen: 你的屏障持续时间更长，并且你可以引爆它进行一次爆炸性的反击。法术的持续时间增加到1分钟。你可以解除该法术。如果有任何弹丸被困在屏障中，你可以作为解消法术的一部分施展念动射弹将它们射向一个生物。从屏障而非你的位置开始判断念动射弹的射程。
Amp.WarpSpace: 选择30尺内一个你有视线和效果线的方格。从该位置决定法术的效果线和视线，也决定生物相对该法术是否具有掩蔽。该法术可以超过根据你原本位置测量的常规射程，只要法术目标到你选择的方格的距离在其常规射程内。

WarpStep.Base: 空间在瞬息之间收缩，你能用单动作施展该法术。
WarpStep.Heightened: 你完全扭曲了空间而不需要再走过其间的距离。你可以选择传送到一个在你视线和效果范围内的位置，最大距离等于你速度的两倍（在应用了跃迁步的状态加值后）。这将赋予该法术以传送特性。

Amp.WhisperingSteps: 选择一个敌人作为该法术的目标。如果该敌人的豁免失败或被法术击中，你就能在该生物的脑海中低语，迫使它朝你选择的方向快步；由于这是强制移动，你不能强迫该生物进入危险地形、跳下栏杆或类似的行动。在它快步之后，该生物会在24小时内暂时对这个增幅免疫。

Mindshift.Addendum: You replace any save this action requires with a @Check[will|against:occult] save.

OscillatingWave.Mindshift: 心象转移：增加/移除能量

SpellModification.Daze: 你可以在更远的距离上晕眩敌人，晕眩术距离增加到120尺。
SpellModification.DeepRoots: When you Cast a Spell that imposes the controlled condition or otherwise forces the target to take certain actions (such as @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.aIHY2DArKFweIrpf]{Command}), you can choose one target that critically failed its save. When that target finishes fulfilling any commands issued by your spell, or when the spell is dispelled or counteracted, the target takes @Damage[(@item.level)d6[mental]] damage.
SpellModification.DetectMagic: 你拥有其他施法者梦寐以求的精细掌控技巧。当你施展侦测魔法时，你会察觉到范围中的任何受到法术影响或携带魔法物品的生物，并且你会确定范围中任何魔法危害当中的主要魔法位置（对于侦测幻象有正常的限制）。这通常表现为你视野的改变，比如看到生物或危害周围有一个柔和的光环。对这些现象的感应并不能使你清楚地知道生物身上的是哪种法术，也不能知道它的哪些物品是有魔法的。
SpellModification.Figment: The range of _figment_ increases to 60 feet. When you Sustain the spell, you can move the apparent sound or vision up to 15 feet. You can then attempt to [[/act create-a-diversion]] as usual. Those creatures who disbelieved the illusion aren't affected by this diversion.
SpellModification.Frostbite: 你可以从更远的地方冻结目标。你的冻伤范围增加到120尺。
SpellModification.Guidance: 你的眼睛无处不在，使你能够从远程给予指引。神导术的距离增加到120英尺。
SpellModification.Ignition: 你可以在远处大幅增加目标的热量。使用引火术作为远程攻击时，将范围增加到60尺。使用引火术作为近战攻击时，你的攻击范围增加5尺。
SpellModification.Message: 你的传讯不受障碍阻隔。该法术可以旅行120尺，绕过墙壁和障碍物传达到目标，这意味着只要你不需要效果线或视觉系来施展该法术，只要你知道目标的位置且有一条未被阻挡并不长于120尺的路径到达目标。
SpellModification.PhaseBolt: 你的相位矢能暂时将命中目标的掩护移位。在成功时，降低目标的AC环境加值（如果有）1点，直到你的下一回合开始。
SpellModification.PsychicRapport: After you Cast a Spell with the mental trait, until the start of your next turn, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Deception, Diplomacy, and Intimidation checks, and to Perception checks to [[/act sense-motive]].
SpellModification.Shield: 你的护盾术可以施展在他人身上。当你施展护盾术，你可以选择30尺内的目标盟友取代你自己获得该法术增益。使用护盾术进行格挡的选择仍然取决于你并占用你的反应。
SpellModification.StrainMind: 即使你的心灵力量已经干涸，你也能让身体突破极限以使用增幅。你将你知道的消耗1点聚能的增幅应用在法术上。你不支付通常需花费的聚能点数，而是失去受增幅心能戏法环级4倍的生命值，同时你流出鼻血或产生其他可见的伤害表征。
SpellModification.TelekineticHand: 你的念动之手可以拿起1负载的物体。如果该戏法升阶到3环或以上，负载上限提升到2负载。如果该戏法升阶到7环或以上，负载上限提升到3负载。
SpellModification.TelekineticProjectile: 你的念动射弹能飞得更远。将念动射弹的距离增加到60尺。
SpellModification.ThoughtformSummoning: Whenever you summon a creature, you can choose to instead create a psychic construct of that creature. This grants it resistance to physical damage equal to half its level, weakness 5 to force and mental damage, and the ability to pass through enemies' spaces without needing to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.21WIfSu7Xd7uKqV8]{Tumble Through} (though it can't end its turn in an occupied space).
SpellModification.WarpStep: 你能更大幅地跃过空间，当你使用跃迁步时，你获得10尺速度状态加值而非5尺。

UnleashPsyche.DamageLabel: 通过心能者施法能力施法

AnimalCompanion.HuntPreyAddendum: When you Hunt Prey, your animal companion gains the action's benefits and your hunter's edge benefit if you have one.

DoublePrey.HuntPreyAddendum: When you use the Hunt Prey action, you can pick two creatures as your prey.

GravityWeapon.RollOptionLabel: 重压武器 - 本轮第一次武器打击

HamstringingStrike.Note:
If you hit your prey, the creature takes a -5-foot status penalty to Speed. If you critically hit your prey, the creature takes a -10-foot status penalty to Speed.
@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.ESnzqtwSgahLcxg2]{Effect: Hamstringing Strike}

HuntersEdge.FirstAttack: 这一轮首次攻击猎杀目标

Flurry.Description: Your multiple attack penalty for attacks against your hunted prey is –3 (–2 with an agile attack) on your second attack of the turn instead of –5, and –6 (–4 with an agile attack) on your third or subsequent attack of the turn, instead of –10.
Flurry.Label: 连击

Outwit.Description: You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to AC against your prey's attacks and a +2 circumstance bonus to Deception checks, Intimidation checks, Stealth checks, and any checks to Recall Knowledge about the prey.
Outwit.Label: 机智

Precision.Description: The first time you hit your hunted prey in a round, you also deal 1d8 additional precision damage. At 11th level, the extra damage increases to 2d8 precision damage, and at 19th level, the extra damage increases to 3d8 precision damage.
Precision.Label: 精准
Precision.ToggleLabel: 精准 - 命中猎杀目标

MasterfulCompanion.HuntPreyAddendum: When you Hunt Prey, your animal companion gains the masterful hunter benefit associated with your hunter's edge, rather than just your original hunter's edge benefit.

MasterfulHunter.Flurry: 如果你对武器的熟练等级为大师，你对于猎物的回合内第二次攻击的多重攻击减值变为-2（使用灵巧攻击为-1），你同轮的第三次或更多攻击的多重攻击减值变为-4（使用灵巧攻击为-2）。
MasterfulHunter.Label: 大师猎手
MasterfulHunter.Outwit: 如果你在欺骗、威吓、隐秘或者你用来回忆关于猎物知识的技能上拥有大师熟练，你针对猎物使用该技能时获得的环境加值从+2提升到+4。如果你对你的护甲拥有大师熟练，你对抗猎物的攻击的AC的环境加值从+1提升到+2。
MasterfulHunter.Precision: 你在一轮中第二次命中你的猎物时也会造成1d8精准伤害。19级时第二次击中目标会造成2d8精准伤害，第三次击中目标会造成1d8精准伤害。

SharedPrey.HuntPreyAddendum: When you use Hunt Prey and select only one prey, you can grant your Hunt Prey benefits and hunter's edge to an ally in addition to gaining them yourself. The ally retains these benefits until you use Hunt Prey again.

TheHarderTheyFall.CriticalSuccess: On a critical success, your target takes @Damage[(ternary(gte(@actor.system.skills.athletics.rank,3),4,2))d8[bludgeoning]] damage.
TheHarderTheyFall.Success: On a success, your target takes @Damage[(ternary(gte(@actor.system.skills.athletics.rank,3),2,1))d8[bludgeoning]] damage.

TripleThreat.HuntPreyAddendum: When you use Hunt Prey, you can designate three creatures as prey, designate two creatures as prey and share the effect with one ally (as Shared Prey), or designate one creature as prey and share the effect with two allies.

Vindicator.BenefitsAddendum: 你对你的猎杀目标施展的法术攻击骰获得+1状态加值，而他们在对抗你施放的神术的豁免骰上受到-1状态减值。
Vindicator.SpellPenaltyAddendum: 你的猎杀目标在对抗你施放的神术法术的豁免上承受状态减值。
Vindicator.Interrogate: 对抗伪装成你信仰神祇的信徒的不死生物或变形生物

RapidAdaptation.Prompt: 此角色是否已经拥有游泳速度？

LabRat.Note: 你在抵抗毒素或灵药效果的豁免骰上成功时，视为大成功处理。

WarrenNavigator.Note: 你在进行辨别方向时，检定结果的成功度视为比实际上升1级。

DivineRetribution.CriticalSuccess: If the target is evil, it is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} until the start of your next turn on a critical hit.
DivineRetribution.Success: If the target is evil, it is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} until the start of your next turn on a hit.

RemainingAir.AttackOrSpells: 如果你攻击或施放任意法术，你回合结束时减少2剩余空气而非1。
RemainingAir.Label: 剩余空气
RemainingAir.Speak: 如果你说话（包括施法），你失去所有剩余空气。

ReflectionOfLife.Description:
You gain fast healing 3 for 1 minute. This amount of fast healing increases by 1 for every 2 levels you have beyond 5th level

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.campaign-effects.Item.DOxl0FDd21VMDOMP]{Effect: Reflection of Life (Fast Healing)}.
ReflectionOfLife.Title: 生命共鸣

ReflectionOfLight.Description: You cast @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.DyiD239dNS7RIxZE]{Holy Light} as an innate divine spell, heightened to a spell rank equal to half your level rounded up.
ReflectionOfLight.Title: 光之反射

ReflectionOfStone.Description: You cast @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.2BV2yYPfVJ5zirZt]{Mountain Resilience} as an innate divine spell, heightened to a spell rank equal to half your level rounded up.
ReflectionOfStone.Title: 石之反射

ReflectionOfStorm.Description: You cast @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.4MOew29Z1oCX8O28]{Moment of Renewal} (self only) as an 8th-rank divine innate spell and regain 1 Focus Point.
ReflectionOfStorm.Title: 风暴反射

ReflectionOfWater.Description: You cast @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.zfn5RqAdF63neqpP]{Control Water} as a 5th-rank innate divine spell. The area of water you control increases by 10 feet in length and width for every 2 levels you have beyond 10th level.
ReflectionOfWater.Title: 水之反射

RevealingLight.Description: A creature affected by _revealing light_ is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled}. If the creature was @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}, it becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} instead. If the creature was already concealed for any other reason, it is no longer concealed.
RevealingLight.Label: 显光尘

OneWithTheSpirits.Label: 众魂合一 — 造成精魂伤害

Critical.Label: 致命衰弱
Critical.Note:
The target attempts a @Check[fortitude|against:rogue] save against your class DC with the following effects.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} until the end of your next turn.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 2} until the end of your next turn.

Critical Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} until the end of your next turn.

Debilitation.Label: 衰弱

PrecisionDamage.Label: 精准伤害
PrecisionDamage.Note: The target takes an additional 2d6 precision damage from your attacks. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.ZZXIUvZqqIxkMfYa]{Effect: Precise Debilitations}

PreventFlanking.Label: 无法夹击
PreventFlanking.Note: The target can't flank or contribute to allies' flanking. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.JUgx48XHMz4QM4Ir]{Effect: Debilitation (No Flanking)}

PreventReactions.Label: 无法进行反应动作
PreventReactions.Note: 目标无法使用反应动作。

ReduceCover.Label: 减少掩蔽
ReduceCover.Note: 目标不能从举起盾牌、次等掩蔽、或标准掩蔽中获得AC的环境加值；而从高等掩蔽或寻找掩蔽中获得AC的环境加值只有 +2 。

SpeedPenalty.Label: 速度减值
SpeedPenalty.Note: The target takes a -10-foot status penalty to its Speeds. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.yBTASi3FvnReAwHy]{Effect: Debilitating Strike}

Debilitation.Title: 衰弱 f
Debilitation.Trigger: 触发 你的打击命中一个措手不及的生物并造成伤害。

Weakness.Label: 弱点
Weakness.Note: The target gains weakness 5 to your choice of bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.Rgt9hH3W1oh9dvku]{Effect: Vicious Debilitations}

DistractingFeint.Text: While a creature is off-guard by your Feint, it also takes a -2 circumstance penalty to Perception checks and Reflex saves. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.7hRgBo0fRQBxMK7g]{Effect: Distracting Feint}

EldritchTrickster.Prompt: 选择一个施法兼职变体。

OverextendingFeint.Note: On a successful Feint, you can have the target take a -2 circumstance penalty to attack rolls against you instead of any other effects that would occur when you Feint. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.x7CjbOQZUgZKW16M]{Effect: Overextending Feint}

TheHarderTheyFall.CriticalSuccess: On a critical success, your target takes @Damage[1d6[bludgeoning],(((@actor.flags.system.sneakAttackDamage.number)d(@actor.flags.system.sneakAttackDamage.faces))[precision])[bludgeoning]] damage.
TheHarderTheyFall.Success: On a success, your target takes @Damage[1d6[bludgeoning]] damage.

TrainSkill.Prompt: 选择一个你要受训的技能

School.Prompt: 选择一种瑟西隆符文魔法学派

FailureHalfDamage.Fortitude: 当你在对抗一个伤害效果的强韧豁免投出失败时，你承受一半伤害。
FailureHalfDamage.Reflex: 当你在对抗一个伤害效果的反射豁免投出失败时，你承受一半伤害。
FailureHalfDamage.Will: 若你在造成伤害的效果的意志豁免上骰出失败时，你只会受到一半伤害。

SaveSuccessToCriticalSuccess.Fortitude: 当你强韧豁免成功时，会变为大成功。
SaveSuccessToCriticalSuccess.Reflex: 当你反射豁免成功时，会变为大成功。
SaveSuccessToCriticalSuccess.Will: 当你意志豁免成功时，会变为大成功。

GuardiansEmbrace.ProtectionLabel: 获得对物理攻击的抗性

ScionOfDomora.SpiritualFlurryNote: Targets become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until the end of your current turn.

Background.FoundlingPrompt: 选择你与柳岸镇的关系

ShadowSignet.Note: 如果你的下一个动作是施放需要对抗AC掷法术攻击骰的法术，选择强韧DC或反射DC。你改为使用你的法术攻击骰来对抗该防御属性，而非AC。

Shillelagh.RollOptionLabel: 将橡棍术的武器伤害骰子增加到三个

PiercingQuills.Note: Your quills unarmed attack deals @Localize[PF2E.PersistentDamage.Bleed1d4.success] on a critical hit.

EsteemedVisitor.Note: 当你在聚居地为了搜集信息或建立印象而进行交涉检定时，如果你的掷骰结果是大失败，这个结果改为普通失败。

FishseekerShoony.Note: 如果你在抓住边缘检定中取得成功，那么这次成功视为大成功；如果这次检定是大失败，则视为普通失败。

ShroudMoss.AssumeShapeTargetLabel: Attacking the creature it stole this shape from

SixthPillarMastery.AttackNote: Whenever you succeed at an unarmed Strike against an opponent, they have a -1 status penalty to saves against your spells until the start of your next turn. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.DX6v0lcI2uA99Yjv]{Effect: Sixth Pillar Mastery}
SixthPillarMastery.SpellNote: 当你使用法术位施放一个法术时，你在下回合开始前无武装攻击的攻击骰获得+1状态加值。

SkillMastery.ExpertPrompt: 选择要获得专家熟练度的技能
SkillMastery.MasterPrompt: 选择获得大师熟练度的技能

SnipingDuoDedication.Label: 狙击小组搭档你的上回合之后已用打击击中目标

BloodlineMutation.SecondTraitPrompt: 你的血脉有第二个关联的特征吗？
BloodlineMutation.TraitPrompt: 选一个跟你的血脉关联的特征。

BloodSovereignty.Description: 你失去相当于法术环级两倍的生命值，然后获得你掌握的两种不同血统奥秘效果。这些效果可以有不同的目标。

BloodMagicDescription.Aberrant: 目标于1轮内在意志豁免上获得-1状态减值，或者你于1轮内在意志豁免上获得+2状态加值。
BloodMagicDescription.Aesir: Either you gain a +2 status bonus to Reflex saving throws for 1 round, or a target takes @Damage[@item.level[electricity]]{1 electricity damage per spell rank} (if the spell already deals initial electricity damage, combine this with the spell's initial damage before determining weaknesses and resistances).
BloodMagicDescription.Angelic: 你或是一个目标在豁免骰上获得+1状态加值，持续1轮。
BloodMagicDescription.Demonic: 目标于1轮内在AC上受到-1状态减值，或者你于1轮内在威吓检定上获得+2状态加值。
BloodMagicDescription.Diabolic: Either a target takes @Damage[@item.level[fire]]{1 fire damage per spell rank} (if the spell already deals initial fire damage, combine this with the spell's initial damage before determining weaknesses and resistances), or you gain a +2 status bonus to Deception checks for 1 round
BloodMagicDescription.Draconic: 你或是一个目标在AC上获得+1状态加值，持续1轮。
BloodMagicDescription.Elemental: Either you gain a +2 status bonus to Intimidation checks for 1 round, or a target takes @Damage[@item.level[@actor.flags.system.elementalBloodline.damageType]] damage. If the spell already deals that type of damage, combine it with the spell's initial damage before determining weaknesses and resistances.
BloodMagicDescription.ExplosionOfPower: Each creature within a @Template[emanation|distance:5] takes @Damage[(@item.level)d6|options:explosion-of-power] damage (@Check[reflex|basic|against:spell] save).
BloodMagicDescription.Fey: Either you gain a +2 status bonus to Performance checks for 1 round, or you can become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} for 1 round. Such obvious concealment can't be used to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.XMcnh4cSI32tljXa]{Hide}
BloodMagicDescription.Genie: 你的施法能够扭曲现实，从而分散敌人的注意力。你于1轮内在欺骗检定上获得+1状态加值，或者目标于1轮内在察觉上承受-1状态减值。
BloodMagicDescription.Hag: You deal @Damage[(4*@item.level)[mental]] damage (@Check[will|basic|against:spell] save) to the first creature that deals damage to you before the end of your next turn; if no creature damages you in that time, you consume that spite to gain temporary Hit Points at the beginning of your next turn equal to the spell's rank. These temporary Hit Points last until the beginning of your following turn.
BloodMagicDescription.Harrow: You become enveloped in possibility, represented as multiple versions of yourself from your possible futures overlaid on each other. You gain @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealment} for 1 round, but can't use the concealment to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.XMcnh4cSI32tljXa]{Hide}.
BloodMagicDescription.Imperial: 直到你的下一个回合开始，你可以选择在AC或是在豁免骰上获得+1状态加值。
BloodMagicDescription.Nymph: 你的动作中尽显宁芙的优雅，甚至能使你的敌人分心。你于1轮内在交涉检定上获得+1状态加值，或者目标于1轮内在意志豁免上承受-1状态减值。
BloodMagicDescription.Phoenix: The primal fire of life and death flows through you or one target. Choose to have either you or a target of the spell gain temporary Hit Points equal to the spell's rank for 1 round, or to have a target of the spell take @Damage[@item.level[fire]] damage (if the spell already deals initial fire damage, combine this with the spell's initial damage before determining weaknesses and resistances).
BloodMagicDescription.PropellingSorcery: 你将你的魔力向外引导，转换为一次急促的移动。你以自由动作进行一次快步，或是将目标按你所选择的方向移动5尺。
BloodMagicDescription.Psychopomp: The border between life and death becomes blurred to you. Either you gain a +2 status bonus to Fortitude saving throws for 1 round, or a target takes @Damage[@item.level[void]] if it's alive or @Damage[@item.level[vitality]] if it's undead. If the spell already deals that type of damage, combine it with the spell's initial damage before determining weaknesses and resistances.
BloodMagicDescription.ReflectHarm: 在你下一个回合的回合开始前，你第一次受到法术的伤害时可以尝试一次攻击骰对抗施放了那个法术的生物。成功命中时，该生物遭受与你所受相同数量相同类型的伤害。大成功时，该生物承受两倍伤害。

Shadow.Text: 影子在你或是一个目标的周围变得愈发幽暗，在隐秘检定上获得+1状态加值或是在察觉上承受-1状态减值，持续1轮。

BloodMagicDescription.TerraformingTrickery: 你周围的每个相邻格子都将变成困难地形，或是每个相邻格子都不再是困难地形。这个伎俩对高等困难地形没有效果，也无法消除危害性地形带来的伤害性影响。
BloodMagicDescription.Title: 血统奥秘
BloodMagicDescription.Undead: Either you gain temporary Hit Points equal to the spell's rank until the start of your next turn, or a target takes @Damage[@item.level[void]] damage (if the spell already deals initial void damage, combine this with the spell's initial damage before determining weaknesses and resistances).
BloodMagicDescription.Wyrmblessed: 你的声音传递巨龙之威。你在1个回合内获得威吓检定上的+1状态加值，或者目标在1个回合内意志豁免受到-1状态减值。

TapIntoBlood.Arcane: Your mind temporarily opens to the secrets of the world. Attempt to [[/act recall-knowledge skill=arcana]]{Recall Knowledge}; you can use Arcana instead of the skill normally needed for that subject. If you critically fail at this check, you get a failure instead.
TapIntoBlood.Divine: Whatever divine provenance is in your lineage guides you to instinctively move yourself or others out of harm's way. You Step, or you [[/act reposition skill=religion]]{Reposition} a target within your reach using Religion for the check.
TapIntoBlood.Occult: 奇妙的迷雾或色彩的漩涡掩盖了你的移动。你进行一次最远10尺的快步。
TapIntoBlood.Primal: The immense power of nature echoes in your voice. You can attempt a Nature check to [[/act demoralize skill=nature]]{Demoralize} a target.
TapIntoBlood.Requirements: 你正在从血统奥秘效果中获益

SafeguardSoul.Label: 你在对抗尝试操纵你灵魂的效果

SpiralSworn.Label: 目标是不死生物火被囚困的灵魂

SoulBleed.Note: 你获得等同于该次攻击所造成精魂伤害的临时生命值，持续到你下一个回合的开始。

SpellEffectGluttonsJaw.Text: If you hit with your jaws and deal damage, you gain [[/r (ceil(@item.level/2))d6 #Temporary Hit Points]] temporary Hit Points.

SpellEffectKgalaserkesAxes.ToggleLabel: 加菈瑟克之斧—被目标伤害过

RollOptionLabel.First: 寒心披风 — 第一个能力
RollOptionLabel.Second: 寒心披风 — 第二个能力

RollOptionLabel.First: 熔心披风 — 第一个能力
RollOptionLabel.Second: 熔心披风 — 第二个能力

ReactiveTouch.DamageNote: Any metal that touches you takes @Damage[2d6[acid]] damage that bypasses Hardness.

RollOptionLabel.First: 钢躯熔心 - 第一个能力
RollOptionLabel.Second: 钢躯熔心 - 第二个能力

SpellEffectMentalMap.ToggleLabel: 心灵地图 — 启用生存和回忆知识加值

SpellEffectProtection.Prompt: 选择防护术对抗的阵营

SpellEffectTemptFate.Note: 如果豁免骰结果为成功，它变为大成功。如果是失败，它变为大失败，并且该大失败不会由于任何通常会减弱大失败的效果所减弱。

SpellEffectUnravelKnowledge.ToggleLabel: 拆解知识 — 检定或DC应用减值

AgileHand.CriticalFailureNote: 如果你大失败，法术就会结束，并且你在24小时内不能再使用这种修改。
AgileHand.Description: When you cast _telekinetic hand_, you can modify its target to be a set of thieves' tools. When you Cast the Spell in this way, the tools move up to 20 feet towards a device or lock. After you Sustain the spell on future turns, you can use the tools to attempt Thievery checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{Disable a Device} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{Pick a Lock} within the spell's range, but you take a -2 penalty to your Thievery check. If you critically fail, the spell ends and you can't use this modification again for 24 hours.

AnimateNet.Description: When you cast _animate rope_, you can modify its target to be 1 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.T8EopYZLT137CsdW]{Net}. If you do, replace the spell's standard effects with the following: You cause a net to animate and throw itself at a Medium or smaller creature within 20 feet of the net. Attempt a spell attack roll against the target's Reflex DC. On a success, the target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} and takes a -10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds until it Escapes; on a critical success, it's also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} until it Escapes. The Escape DC is equal to your spell DC as long as the spell lasts. Once the spell ends, the Escape DC returns to the normal DC for a net (usually 16), and a creature adjacent to the target can Interact to remove the net.

BarrierShield.Description: When you cast _shield_, you can modify the spell to create a solid barrier you can use for @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.other-effects.Item.I9lfZUiCwMiGogVi]{Cover}, but not for blocking. You can't use the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{Shield Block} reaction when the spell is modified in this way, but you (and only you) can spend an action to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{Take Cover} to gain standard cover from it.

BeaconMark.Description: 当你施展魔法印记时，你可以修改该法术以增加以下的升阶条目。
BeaconMark.DescriptionHeightened: You attune yourself to the marked target. While the spell lasts, you can spend a single action, which has the concentrate, detection, and divination traits, to attempt to locate the target, learning the direction to the target as long as you are within 1 mile of it. If the target is a creature or a creature is in possession of the target object, the creature can attempt a @Check[will] saving throw against your spell DC. If it succeeds, your attempt to locate the target fails and you can't attempt this again for 1 day. You can only have a single target marked with a _sigil_ modified in this way. If you Cast this Spell again on a second target, the _sigil_ spell on the first target ends, and your mark fades.

ChokingSmoke.Description: When you cast _fireball_ heightened to at least 6th rank, you can modify the spell's standard effects as follows: Reduce the spell's damage by 6d6. Your _fireball_ leaves behind a lingering cloud of toxic smoke in its area. While it's smoke instead of mist, this cloud otherwise has the effects of @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.GKpEcy9WId6NJvtx]{Stinking Cloud}.

ConfoundingImage.Description: 当你施放镜影术时，你可以将其持续时间改为维持，最长1分钟，并修改其范围为30尺。如果你这样做，你用以下的效果来取代该法术的标准效果：你创造一个你自己的幻术副本，出现在范围内一个无人的方格中。这个影像会占据空间，并有5尺的触及，你的盟友可以与这个影像进行夹击。它没有任何其他生物通常会有的属性，除了等于你的法术DC的AC和等于你的法术DC-10的豁免调整。如果影像被攻击击中或豁免失败，或者你从它身边移动超过30尺，则法术结束。生物可以不受阻碍地在其空间内移动。当你维持法术时，你可以将影像移动到范围内一个未被占用的方格。

DirectedPoison.Description: 当你施放死云术时，修改其持续时间为维持，最多1分钟，并修改其标准效果以包括以下内容：死云不会每回合远离你。每回合当你维持法术时，你可以将死云向你选择的方向移动10尺。

DiskRider.Description: 当你施放浮碟术时，你可以将其持续时间修改为维持，最多10分钟。如果你这样做，在它的效果上增加以下的升阶条目。
DiskRider.DescriptionHeightened: 该盘可以承载最多10负载。如果你骑在浮碟上，法术不再结束（但如果任何其他生物骑在浮碟上，包括该生物骑在你身上，法术仍会结束）。如果你骑在浮碟上，它就会改变其载重力以承载你，再加上相当于你可以携带并不被超载的最大额外负载。当你骑在浮碟上，每次你维持法术时可以指示它沿着地面移动，最多 30 英尺或你的速度，以较慢者为准。当你骑在它上面，只要它在坚实的地面上结束其运动，圆盘就可以穿过液体表面移动。如果它在不能支撑它的表面上结束运动，则法术结束。

DrenchingMist.Description: 当你施放隐雾术时，你可以对它进行修改，使其效果上增加以下的升阶条目。
DrenchingMist.DescriptionHeightened: 雾气中充满了水分。区域内的非魔法火焰会自动熄灭。选择该区域内的一处魔法火焰或具有火焰特征的法术并尝试反制它。

ForcefulPush.Description: 当你施放念动之手时，你可以将其目标修改为一个生物。如果你这样做了，就用以下效果取代它的标准效果：你以念动力推动你的敌人。以法术攻击骰对抗目标强韧DC。成功时，你将目标推离5尺。如果大成功，你将目标推离10尺。

LarcenousHand.Description: When you cast _telekinetic hand_, you can remove its duration, modify its range to 20 feet, and modify its target to be an attended object within the spell's Bulk limit that wouldn't be time-consuming to remove. Add the following to the spell's standard effects: If the creature attending the object is willing to have you take the item, Telekinetic Hand carries the item to you. If the creature is unwilling, you must attempt to [[/act steal]] the target object with a Thievery check. The usual restrictions on attempts to Steal an object apply, including the restrictions that you can't steal objects that would be extremely noticeable or time-consuming to remove (like worn shoes or armor or actively wielded objects) and you can't Steal from a creature in combat or otherwise on guard. On a successful Steal check, the Telekinetic Hand carries the item to you, and on a critical failure, you can't use this modification again for 1 hour. If you're a master in Thievery, you can attempt to Steal from a creature in combat or otherwise on guard, though if you do so, the spell's casting time increases by 1 action.

LingeringFlames.Description: When you cast _fireball_, you can modify its effects, decreasing the base damage to 5d6 and causing it to deal @Damage[(2*(@item.level - 2))[fire,persistent]] damage to creatures that fail their save, doubled as normal on a critical failure. If you do, replace its heightened entry with the following.
LingeringFlames.DescriptionHeightened: 伤害增加1d6，持续火焰伤害增加2。

ObscuredTerrain.Description: 当你施放隐雾术时，你可以修改该法术，用以下方法取代其标准效果。你创造一团浓雾笼罩该区域，使生物难以看到地面。雾气内的区域对于不能看穿雾气的生物来说是困难地形。你可以解消这团雾。

ScatteredFire.Description: When you cast _fireball_, you can modify its area to be two non-overlapping @Template[burst|distance:10]{10-foot bursts}.

ShiningArms.Description: When you cast _light_, you can modify its target to be 1 melee weapon, either unattended or possessed by you or a willing ally, and modify its duration to be 1 minute. If you do, add the following to its effects: When a creature wielding the weapon critically hits a foe, you can Dismiss the Spell as a reaction, causing the foe to be @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round. After you use this reaction, you can't use this modification again for 10 minutes.
ShiningArms.Label: 闪耀武装
ShiningArms.Note: When a creature wielding the weapon critically hits a foe, you can Dismiss the spell as a reaction, causing the foe to be @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round.

SiphoningTouch.Description: 当你施展吸血鬼之触时，你可以修改其标准效果如下。你可以将临时生命给予30尺范围内的一个盟友，而不是让自己获得临时生命。1分钟后，该盟友将失去任何剩余的临时生命。

SmolderingExplosion.Description: When you cast _fireball_ heightened to at least 4th rank, you can modify the spell to add the following to its standard effects: Your _fireball_ leaves behind a brief cloud of smoke in its area. While it's smoke instead of mist, this cloud otherwise has the effects of @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.9XHmC2JgTUIQ1CCm]{Mist}, except that it lasts only 1 round.

StealVitality.Description: 当你施放吸血鬼之触时，你可以修改其标准效果如下：你将不获得临时生命值。如果你的目标失败或大失败，你可以尝试一个反制检定来消除自己身上的笨拙或力竭状态，使用该状态的来源来确定其反制等级和DC。如果该状态是由一个持续的效果引起的，而你没有消除该效果，该状态会在你的下一回合结束时恢复。

SummonEnsemble.Description: When you cast _summon instrument_, you can modify its duration to be sustained, up to 1 minute. When you do, you summon a number of instruments equal to your spellcasting ability modifier that hover around you and play of their own accord. Once per turn when you Sustain the Spell, choose an opponent within 30 feet who can hear your performance. The target must attempt a @Check[will] save against the spell's DC; on a failure, it becomes distracted by your performance and becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} for 1 round. The target is then temporarily immune for 24 hours.

SurroundingFlames.Description: When you cast _wall of fire_, you can modify its standard effects as follows: Instead of a 5-foot-thick, 10-foot-radius ring of flame, you can form the wall into a @Template[burst|distance:10]{10-foot-radius} hemisphere of fire.

TopplingTentacles.Description: When you cast _black tentacles_, replace the spell's standard effects with the following: Tentacles slither along the ground in the area, attempting to hinder anyone within. Sticky black tentacles attempt to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{Trip} each creature in the area. Attempt spell attack rolls against the Reflex DCs of each affected creature. Any creature you succeed against is knocked @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} and takes @Damage[3d6[bludgeoning]] damage. Whenever a creature ends its turn in the area, the tentacles attempt to Trip that creature if it isn't already prone, and they deal @Damage[1d6[bludgeoning]] damage to any creature already prone. Creatures treat the spell's area as difficult terrain.

TracingSigil.Description: When you cast _sigil_, you can modify the spell to add the following to its standard effects: The target leaves a magical trail that you and others can try to follow. You and other creatures can attempt to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.EA5vuSgJfiHH7plD]{Track} the target, substituting an Arcana, Nature, Occultism, or Religion check (whichever matches the magical tradition of your _sigil_ spell) for the Survival check. Much like Tracking with Survival, this must take place somewhere the target has been and follow the trail; it doesn't allow anyone to find the target from a distance. You can only have a single target marked with a modified _sigil_ in this way. If you use this ability again on a second target, the _sigil_ spell on the first target ends, and your mark fades.

UneasyRest.Description: When you cast _sleep_, you can modify the spell to add the following to its standard effects: Subjects of your spell experience troubled dreams. When a target that failed or critically failed its saving throw wakes up, it is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

VolatileGrease.Description: When you cast _grease_, you can modify its target to be 1 creature. If you do, replace the spell's standard effects with the following: You splash the target with combustible grease. The target must attempt a @Check[reflex] save.
VolatileGrease.Failure: 和成功一样，除了对火焰的弱点持续1分钟。
VolatileGrease.Success: 目标被溅上油脂并获得火焰弱点2，直到你下一回合结束。目标或相邻的生物可以用一个交互动作擦掉可燃的油脂，结束这个效果。

WildLights.Description: 当你施放光亮术时，你可以将其持续时间修改为1分钟，并修改其标准效果，以创造一个形如超小型生物的漂浮光源，而不是至多四个光源。这个生物会在你的头上盘旋，除非你花费一个具有专注特征的单动作来引导光源移动最多30尺，在这种情况下，它会一直留在那里直到你再次引导它。如果你引导它回到你的头上，它就会在你头上盘旋并再次跟随你，直到你把它引导到其他地方。如果该生物移动到你的120尺以外，它就会立即消失。

BeastmastersSigil.AdjacentLabel: 目标和一个兽王印记召唤出的生物相邻

CriticalHitNote.GreaterOrMajor: The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} until the end of its next turn.
CriticalHitNote.Weapon: The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} until the end of its next turn.

SpellmastersResilience.Prompt: 选择要获得抗性的法术根源

Spellshape.BizzareTransformation: If your next action is to cast @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.8RWfKConLYFZpQ9X]{Untamed Form}, you can change the damage type of a single unarmed attack granted by the untamed form form to one of the following: acid, bludgeoning, cold, electricity, fire, poison, piercing, or slashing. The chosen attack gains the appropriate trait.
Spellshape.BloodlineConduit: 你不会在施放这个法术时消耗法术位。
Spellshape.BondConservation: 你获得一次额外机会使用汲取连结物品。你可以使用它来施放一个法术，此法术的环级低于先前法术2级及以上，并且必须在你下一轮结束前使用它，否则你会失去这个机会。
Spellshape.BurningSpell: The spell deals @Damage[(@item.rank)[persistent,fire]] in addition to its other effects. This has no effect if the spell already deals persistent fire damage. The spell gains the fire trait
Spellshape.CallAndResponse: 当该法术生效时，由你选择一名受该法术影响的盟友可以使用单动作对你的寻呼部奏唱一段应答部，该动作具有听觉与专注特征，并且会使该法术的持续时间延长1轮。只能有一名盟友奏响给定寻呼部的应答部，且对该盟友的应答部再次进行应答不会产生额外效果。
Spellshape.CastDown: The target is knocked @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} if it takes any damage from the spell. If the target critically fails its save against the spell, it also takes a –10-foot status penalty to its Speed for 1 minute. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.Ve1CRFI8ikL6dqcL]{Effect: Cast Down}

ChaoticSpell.acid: Each creature damaged by the spell becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}.
ChaoticSpell.cold: 每个被该法术伤害到的生物在所有速度上承受-10尺减值，持续到你下回合结束。
ChaoticSpell.electricity: Each creature damaged by the spell is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until the end of your next turn
ChaoticSpell.fire: Each creature damaged by the spell takes @Damage[(@item.rank)[persistent,fire]] damage.
ChaoticSpell.sonic: Eah creature damaged by the spell is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened} for 2 rounds.

Note.destruction: 法术无视10点抗力，并且你可以重投所有结果为1的伤害骰。如果法术将一个生物的HP减少至0，他将被法术分解成无限小的微粒，甚至不会留下灰烬；这是个死亡效果。
Note.renewal: The spell grants the target regeneration 20, restoring 20 Hit Points at the start of its turn. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.yZW8I6G2Di6gdd16]{Effect: Codex of Destruction and Renewal}

Spellshape.ConcealSpell: 该法术获得晦匿特征，藏匿了发光的符文，魔法的火花，和其他通常会泄露你施法的呈现。该特征藏匿的只有法术的施法动作和呈现，不包括其效果，所以观察者还是能看到有条射线从你那边飞射而出，或看到你消失在空气中。
Spellshape.CourageousAdvance: 你任选一位从该法术获得状态加值的盟友，其可以立即使用一个反应动作进行一次行走。
Spellshape.CourageousAssault: 你可以选择一名从此法术中获得状态加值的盟友，其立即用反应动作进行一次近战打击。
Spellshape.CourageousOnslaught: 你选定其中一名从该法术中获得状态加值的盟友，其可以立即使用一个反应动作进行行走，然后进行一次近战打击。
Spellshape.CrypticSpell: 若你采取的下个动作是施法，则尝试一次自然检定对抗所有观察者的察觉DC。若你的检定成功对抗一名观察者的察觉DC，则该观察者不会发现你在施法，即便法术的语言、姿势、材料成分在通常情况下很明显，且法术在通常情况下有明显的感官表现使得施法对于周遭的人来说十分明显也是如此。所有这些都隐藏在自然景观以及环境的声音之中。该能力仅会隐藏法术的施法动作以及法术表现，而非其效果，因此观察者仍然能够看到你变成了一头巨熊。
Spellshape.CurrentSpell: Until the start of your next turn, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to AC or a +2 circumstance bonus against ranged attacks. This effect has the air or water trait, or both, depending on the traits of the spell you cast. You also gain a +1 circumstance bonus to all saves against effects with the selected trait, depending on the spell's traits. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.8HGz3rQCHNgdAqFC]{Effect: Current Spell}
Spellshape.DefensiveCoordination: 你可以举起盾牌，并且你任选一名从该法术中获得状态加值的盟友，其也能立即使用一个反应动作举起盾牌。
Spellshape.DefensiveRecovery: If the target regains Hit Points from the spell, it also gains a +2 status bonus to AC and saving throws for 1 round. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.jwxurN6JPQm9wXug]{Effect: Defensive Recovery}
Spellshape.DivineInfusion: The target deals additional damage with its melee weapons and unarmed attacks until the end of its next turn. The damage type is void if you cast harm and vitality if you cast heal. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.eecIuD6sGPX0FJcT]{Effect: Divine Infusion}.
Spellshape.DousingSpell: 你用水浸透目标。若目标具有持续酸蚀或火焰伤害，结束这些状态的DC降低至10点，并且该生物能够立即尝试一次纯骰检定来结束这些类型的持续伤害。该法术获得水特征（这会使该法术对将水视为弱点的生物造成额外伤害）。
Spellshape.EbbAndFlow: 选择区域中一个会被该法术所伤害的生物，并且选择区域中另一个会被该法术治愈的生物。你的治疗术或者伤害术同时以这些生物为目标。
Spellshape.EchoingSpell: 你可以在你下个回合的回合结束前第二次施放这一法术而无需消耗法术位。
Spellshape.EchoingChannel: 选择射程内的另一名生物。以该生物为目标再次施放一个1动作版本的相同法术。此法术与你施放的2环级伤害术或治疗术具有相同环级且无需消耗法术位。
Spellshape.EnergyAblation: 如果你下个动作是施放法术，并且其会造成至少一种能量伤害（酸蚀、 寒冷、电击、火焰、力场、音波、命能或虚能），你获得你所选能量伤害类型的抗力，其数值等于法术环级。抗力持续到你下个回合结束。无论你的法术是否造成伤害，你都能获得抗力。
Spellshape.EnergyFusion: 选择一个你法术库中能够造成另一种能量伤害类型的非戏法的法术，并且额外消耗一个和这一次要法术同环级的法术位。你所释放的法术将造成等同于所花费的次要法术位环级的额外伤害。该法术的总伤害将平摊到所施放法术的伤害类型级次要法术的伤害类型上。
Spellshape.ExplosiveArrival: All creatures in a @Template[emanation|distance:10] around the creature you summoned take @Damage[(@item.level)d4[@actor.flags.system.spellshape.explosiveArrivalDamage]|options:area-damage] damage. If the creature summoned has the acid, cold, electricity, sonic, or spirit trait, you can deal damage of that type instead.
Spellshape.FamiliarsResolve: If the next action you use is to Cast a Spell, you or an ally within 30 feet gain a +2 status bonus to saving throws against effects that would cause you to be doomed or frightened for 1 round. At 14th level, you or an ally gain a +3 status bonus to saving throws against these effects instead. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.6I4qWkHzxj4MAt6g]{Effect: Familiar's Resolve}
Spellshape.ForcibleEnergy: If your next action is to Cast a Spell that deals acid, cold, electricity, fire, or sonic damage, you can select one target that was damaged to gain weakness 5 to that damage type until the end of your next turn. If a spell deals multiple types of energy damage, choose one that the target gains weakness to. This has no effect on creatures with resistance or immunity to the energy type you choose. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.0Ai0u9kNJrEudPnN]{Effect: Forcible Energy}
Spellshape.FormControl: 如果你的下一个动作是施放无羁形态，那么无羁形态的法术环级会比通常低2环（最低为1环级），但你可以维持变身1小时或维持原本的持续时间（以持续时间更长者为准）。你仍然可以如常消解无羁形态。
Spellshape.GarlandSpell: A garland of plants grows in a @Template[burst|distance:10] in the spell's range. The plants are difficult terrain and hazardous terrain, covered in your choice of thorns or poisonous vines. Any creature that moves into one of these squares or ends its turn in one takes @Damage[2d6[piercing]]damage for thorns or @Damage[2d6[poison]] for vines. A creature can take this damage only once per turn. You and your familiar are immune to this damage. The plants last for 1 minute or until you cast another Garland Spell, whichever comes first. The damage increases to 3d6 at 16th level and 4d6 at 20th level.
Spellshape.GoldenDragonsBounty: 如果你接下来的动作是施展一个造成钝击、穿刺或挥砍伤害的法术，那么该伤害的类型可以由你选择为寒铁、银或钢，用于弱点、抗力、易伤等。在14级时，将精金加入到金属选择列表中。该法术获得金特征。
Spellshape.GrowthSpell: 增大该法术的区域。对于爆发，增加5尺半径；对于锥形，增大锥形10尺；对于线形，增加15尺长度。法术获得木特征。
Spellshape.GustingSpell: 如果你接下来的动作是施放具有气或电特征的法术，你可以在施法前或施法后飞行最多10尺。
Spellshape.Harmonize: 如果你的下一个动作是施放一个组曲法术，其会成为一个和声组曲。与通常的组曲不同，和声组曲不会在你施放另一个组曲法术时结束，你可以在施放和声组曲的同一轮中施放另一个组曲法术。施放另一个和声组曲法术会使得你已经生效的和声组曲法术立即终止。
Spellshape.HealingTransformation: Your polymorph spell also restores @Damage[(@item.rank)d6[healing]] to that creature. This is a healing effect.
Spellshape.HeraldicProclamation: All allies within 30 feet gain @Damage[(2 * @item.rank)[healing,vitality]|shortLabel] Hit Points, and all enemies within 30 feet take @Damage[(2 * @item.rank)[spirit]|traits:sanctified] damage with a @Check[will|basic] save against your spell DC.
Spellshape.HeroicRecovery: 目标还会获得三项加值直到其下回合结束：在其速度上获得+5尺状态加值，在攻击骰上获得+1状态加值，以及在伤害骰上获得+1状态加值。此外，若目标处于倒地，其可以立即使用一个不会触发反应动作的自由动作重新站立。
Spellshape.InTune: 如果你的下一个动作是施放影响弥漫区域的组曲法术，该法术的扩散中心会改为60尺内你所选择的一位自愿盟友，而不是你。如果你拥有引导听众，你还可以选择将生效范围改成以该盟友起始的锥形。
Spellshape.InterweaveDispel: If your next action is to cast a single-target spell against an enemy, and you either hit the enemy with the spell attack roll or the enemy fails its saving throw, you can cast @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{Dispel Magic} on the enemy as a free action, expending a spell slot as normal and targeting one spell effect affecting the enemy.
Spellshape.IntoTheFuture: If your next action is to Cast a Spell that takes 1 or 2 actions to cast, the spell's effects occur 1 round later, at the beginning of your next turn, rather than immediately. Targets and choices about the spell must be determined when the spell is cast, and requirements, such as line of sight and line of effect, must be valid both when the spell is cast and when its effects occur. Consequences for the action of Casting the Spell itself, such as an Attack of Opportunity reaction or ending a foe's @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} condition by taking a hostile action, aren't delayed.

KaleidoscopicEntreaty.Description: If your next action is to cast @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Yph1UqZU8vMc9bJG]{Entreat Spirit}, you can cause that spirit to unleash a brilliant display of color, light, and sound in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] centered on you. Each creature in the area must attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell] save against your class DC or spell DC with the following results.
KaleidoscopicEntreaty.CriticalFailure: The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round and dazzled for 1 minute.

Spellshape.KnowledgeOfShapes: You use @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BWomK7EVY0WXxWgh]{Reach Spell} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.FoWO4RnHRwfEIC7Q]{Widen Spell} as a free action.
Spellshape.LeyLineConduit: 你不会在施放这个法术时消耗准备的法术位。
Spellshape.Martyr: You lose @Damage[(@item.rank)d8] Hit Points, which can't be reduced or mitigated in any way, and your ally regains an equal number of Hit Points.
Spellshape.MelodiousSpell: The spell gains the Subtle trait. The trait hides only the spell's spellcasting actions and manifestations, not its effects. As part of using Melodious Spell, you can choose to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{Create a Diversion}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.EEDElIyin4z60PXx]{Perform}, or Request. If you do so, the spell you cast must have the auditory, emotion, sonic, or visual trait to gain the subtle trait.
Spellshape.NonLethal: 如果你下个动作是施放法术，并且法术可以造成伤害且没有死亡或虚能特征，那么该法术会获得非致命特征。
Spellshape.OstentatiousArrivalManifestEidolon: All creatures except you in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] around the creature you summoned or manifested take @Damage[(@actor.level)d4[@actor.flags.system.spellshape.arrivalDamage]|options:area-damage]. If the creature you summoned or manifested has the acid, cold, electricity, fire, sonic, or water trait, the damage is that type instead (or cold damage for the water trait). If the creature has more than one of these traits, you choose which damage type to deal.
Spellshape.OstentatiousArrivalSummonSpell: All creatures in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] around the creature you summoned or manifested take @Damage[(@item.level)d4[@actor.flags.system.spellshape.arrivalDamage]|options:area-damage] damage. If the creature you summoned or manifested has the acid, cold, electricity, fire, sonic, or water trait, the damage is that type instead (or cold damage for the water trait). If the creature has more than one of these traits, you choose which damage type to deal.
Spellshape.OverwhelmingBreath: 如果你下一个动作是施放一个有武僧特征并且没有持续时间的法术，此法术以及因为法术而进行的任何打击，皆可忽视敌人在物理伤害的抗力，忽视的数值与你的等级相同。
Spellshape.OverwhelmingEnergy: 如果你的下一个动作是施放法术，该法术可以忽视目标对酸蚀、寒冷、电击、火焰或音波伤害数量等同于你等级的抗性。该效果会应用在所有由此法术造成的伤害上，包含来自该法术的持续伤害以及后续效果所造成的伤害，例如火墙术所创造出的火墙。生物的免疫效果不受此影响。
Spellshape.PitchPerfectProjection: 若你本轮的下一个动作是施法或使用一个拥有射程的听觉效果，则射程增加30尺。
Spellshape.PortentousSpell: If the next action you use is to Cast a Spell, any creature that attempts to use a reaction triggered by your Cast a Spell activity takes a –2 circumstance penalty to attack rolls and skill checks rolled as part of the reaction. In addition, if the spell includes a spell attack or requires a saving throw, creatures you hit or that fail their saves are @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} with you until the start of your next turn. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.klZVVIetJlR99cT6]{Effect: Portentous Spell}
Spellshape.PurifyingSpell: 如果你的下一个动作是对单个生物施展治疗术，除去治疗术的原有效果，你还可以尝试反制其身上的疾病与毒素。若你如此做，该治疗术获得水特征。
Spellshape.QuickenedCasting: 如果你下个动作是施放一个吟游诗人戏法、或是一个比你拥有的最高环级法术位至少低2环的法术，则减少1施法动作数量（最小1动作）。
Spellshape.ReachSpell: 如果你的下一个动作是施放一个具有射程的法术，该法术的射程提高30尺。若该法术通常情况下射程为接触， 则该法术的射程提高至30尺。
Spellshape.Remediate: 如果你的下一个动作是使用神力源泉来施放3动作版本的伤害术或治疗术法术，你可以控制残余的能量抵消对立的力量。除其通常效果之外，你还可以使用你的伤害术或治疗术法术来尝试反制法术区域内的一个神术效果。
Spellshape.ReverberatingSpell: The spell deals an additional @Damage[1d8[sonic]] damage and all creatures who fail their save against the spell are @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened} for 1 round. Targets who critically fail their saves against this spell are instead deafened for 1 minute. The spell gains the sonic trait.
Spellshape.RockslideSpell: 数个5尺方格会变为困难地形，持续1轮。这些方格必须在地面上，而且全部困难地形的区域必须是连续的。该法术获得土特征。
Spellshape.SafeguardSpell: 如果你的下一个动作是使用施放法术动作施放一个区域法术，那么即使你处于区域之内也不会受到该法术的影响。
Spellshape.ScintillatingSpell: If your next action is to Cast a Spell that doesn't have the darkness trait, has no duration, and requires creatures to attempt a Reflex save, the spell explodes in a spray of scintillating lights, in addition to its other effects. Each creature that failed its Reflex save against the spell is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round, and those who critically failed are instead @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round.
Spellshape.SecondaryDetonationArray: If your next action is to Cast a Spell that deals damage, has no duration, and affects an area, a glowing magic circle appears in a @Template[burst|distance:5] within that area. At the beginning of your next turn, the circle detonates, dealing @Damage[(@item.level)d6[force]|options:area-damage] damage to all creatures within the circle, with a @Check[reflex|against:spell|options:area-effect,damaging-effect]. If the spell dealt a different type of damage, the circle deals @Damage[(@item.level)d6[@actor.flags.system.spellshape.arrayDamage]|options:area-damage]{this type of damage instead} (or one type of your choice if the spell could deal multiple types of damage)
Spellshape.SeneschalSpell: 如果你的下一个动作是施放法术，且你的受监护人在30英尺内，你可以让法术从你的受监护人身上发出。该生物可以使用其反应来大致完成法术的吟唱，这会使法术对你（而不是对它们）而言具有晦匿特征，因为法术的外观仅围绕你的受监护人出现。
Spellshape.SinbladedSpell: If you either succeed on your attack roll or the target fails its saving throw against the spell, you deal @Damage[(@item.rank)[bleed]] damage to the target.
Spellshape.SnowdriftSpell: 如果你的下一个动作是施放具有气，水或寒冷特征，且没有火焰特征的法术，选择地面上一个受该法术影响的生物。与该生物邻接的每格地面会积起及膝深的雪。这些区域变为困难地形直到你的下回合开始。一个生物可以通过交互动作清除一格积雪，且当积雪受到具有火焰特征的效果影响时就会融化。
Spellshape.SowSpell: 如果你下一个动作是使用1或2个动作施法，法术会转而根植在一个邻接方格里。你必须在施放时决定关于该法术的所有可选项。之后的10分钟内，你能以一个反应动作指挥你播种的法术发芽并产生该法术的效果，该反应的触发条件是有一个生物进入播种法术的方格或其邻接方格。同一时间你只能有一个播种法术，如果你在10分钟内没有触发播种法术，法术会消散并失去。成功通过一次察觉检定来对抗你的法术DC的生物可以注意到播种法术。
Spellshape.SpellShroud: If your next action is to Cast a Spell that targets you, you surround yourself in a @Template[emanation|distance:15] of dense magical mist that lasts until the start of your next turn. All creatures within the cloud become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}, and all creatures outside the cloud are concealed to creatures within it.
Spellshape.SplitHex: 如果你接下来的动作是施放一个以单一目标为对象的伤害法术，将其环级降低2级（使其比你能施放的最高环级低2级）。如果你如此，你可以选择第二个目标来受到该法术的影响。
Spellshape.SplitShot: 如果你的下一个动作是使用施放法术动作施放一个需要进行一次攻击骰对抗单个生物的，且没有持续时间的法术，你可以在法术射程内选择一个第二目标。投掷一次攻击骰并将其结果与两个目标的AC进行比较。在计算你的多重攻击减值时这被视为一次攻击。对于你的第二目标，法术仅造成通常伤害的一半，且除了造成的初始伤害之外没有别的效果（譬如造成状态或减值）。
Spellshape.SurgingMight: 若你下一个动作是施放法术，该法术在下列伤害类型中，忽略目标等同于你等级数的抗力：精魂，命能，虚能。该效果对所有因该法术造成的伤害生效，包括持续伤害或法术持续效果造成的伤害。该专长不会使法术克服免疫，只克服抗力。
Spellshape.SynergisticSpell: 你能够以自由动作再施放一个法术，该法术必须以调和法术位施放。
Spellshape.ThunderclapSpell: If your next action is to Cast a Spell that has the electricity trait or deals electricity damage, has no duration, and requires creatures to attempt a saving throw, the force of the spell's lightning creates a thunderclap, in addition to its other effects. Each creature that failed its Reflex save against the spell is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened} for 1 round, and those who critically failed are also knocked @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.
Spellshape.TimelineSplittingSpell: 你施放两道需要1或2动作的法术。他们不能是同一种但是用不同环位施放的法术。你为这两道法术分别花费资源，如法术位，聚能点与材料成分。确定这两道法术会产生的即时效果，包括攻击骰、豁免、伤害以及其他需要的掷骰。然后，选择两道法术之一产生效果，并使用预先掷骰的结果。另一道法术仍然会花费资源，但不会产生任何效果，因为它已经消失到了其他时间线。
Spellshape.UnlimitedPotential: 如果你的下一个动作是施放一个不高于5环且没有持续时间的法术，你不会在施放这个法术时消耗法术位。
Spellshape.UnusualComposition: 如果你的下一个动作是施放一个具有听觉或视觉特征的复合法术，你可以让它影响任何能用感官察觉法术的生物，而不仅仅是特性所指出的感官，甚至包括特殊感官如震颤感应。你可以选择排除任何你选择的感官。
Spellshape.VigorousAnthem: You and all affected allies gain temporary HP equal to 3 + your Charisma modifier that last for 1 minute. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.7AzGhIOx4Df5Cicr]{Effect: Vigorous Anthem}
Spellshape.WhatCouldHaveBeen: 如果你的下一个动作是施法召唤生物，那么召唤出来的生物都会是另一个版本的你。该生物仍然属于你所召唤的生物类型，大体上拥有相同的能力（除了以下调整），它看起来就与你相似，还有着相同的表征，比如言谈举止、纹身、说话方式或者衣服。召唤出来的生物会在你拥有受训熟练度的所有技能的检定中获得+1状态加值，若为专家则+2，若为大师则+3，若为传奇则+4。该生物还会在你不具有受训的技能上获得-2减值。
Spellshape.WidenSpell: 如果你接下来的动作是施放一个具有爆发、锥形或直线范围且没有持续时间的法术，则扩展法术的作用区域。对于通常有至少10尺半径爆发影响区域的法术来说，爆发区域半径增加5尺；对于通常长度为15尺或更低的锥形和线形法术，区域长度增加5尺；对于更大的锥形和线形法术则区域长度增加10尺。
Spellshape.WindTossedSpell: You ignore the target's @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} condition and any cover they have from you. The spell gains the air trait.

GravitationalMorass.Note: Flying creatures that pass through the area (@Template[burst|distance:20] centered within the spell's area) must succeed at a Reflex save against your spell DC or fall to the ground, taking bludgeoning damage equal to half the distance fallen.

FlowingTime.Note: A creature that starts its turn in the burst (@Template[burst|distance:20] centered within the spell's area) is affected by @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.o6YCGx4lycsYpww4]{Haste} on that turn.

Love.Label: 一位你信任或深爱的盟友在你30尺内

SpiritWarrior.SpiritDamage: 灵明剑客 — 造成精魂伤害

Dijiang.Emotion: 当你对情绪效果的豁免失败（但不是大失败）时，你改为获得成功。

AccursedStaff.Note: 当一名敌人在对抗你所施放的具有诅咒特征的法术时豁免失败，你获得等同于该法术环级两倍的临时生命值。此临时生命值持续10分钟。此处所指的“敌人”必须是显著的威胁，并且自愿承受诅咒者亦不被包括在内。

StalwartChant.ToggleLabel: 坚贞守卫 — 对心灵伤害的抗力

Note.CraneStance: 减少跳高和跳远的DC5点，当你跳跃时，可额外水平移动5尺或垂直移动2尺。
Note.GorillaStance: 如果你在攀爬的运动检定上骰出成功，你获得大成功作为替代。
Note.ShatteringEarthStance: All creatures other than you that are within @Template[type:emanation|distance:10]{10 feet} of the target, including the target itself, take @Damage[(@item.system.damage.dice[splash])[bludgeoning]] damage.
Note.StokedFlameStance: If you have access to the flashing sparks' critical specialization effect, you can take an alternate effect instead: if your critical Strike dealt damage, the target takes @Damage[1d6[persistent,fire]] damage.
Note.WaterfowlStance: You can deal that creature @Damage[1d6[slashing]] damage. This damage is increased to @Damage[2d6[slashing]] if the weapon has a greater striking rune and @Damage[3d6[slashing]] if it has a major striking rune.
Note.WildWindStance: 风袭打击忽视@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]和所有的掩蔽。

SteadyBalance.Note: 如果你在一次保持平衡技能动作的检定上获得了成功结果，你会视为获得了大成功结果。

StasianSmash.CriticalFailureText: If you critically fail your dynamo Strike, you take @Damage[1d12[electricity]] damage.
StasianSmash.SuccessText: On a success, the Strike deals an additional 1d12 electricity damage to the target, as well as @Damage[(ternary(gte(@actor.level,18),2,1))d4[electricity]] damage to up to two other foes within 10 feet as sparks leap across the gaps.

SecondaryAdaptation.Prompt: 选择一种瑟基虫人传承

SwallowWhole.InvalidAttack: 被吞下的生物可以攻击那只活吞它的怪物，但是仅能以无武装攻击或是轻负载及更小的武器进行攻击。
SwallowWhole.RuptureDamage: 如果怪物于单次攻击或法术中受到的穿刺或挥砍伤害等于或超过所列的破裂值，那个被吞的生物便重获自由。

ExtravagantParry.Prompt: Do you have a free hand or wield a parry weapon?

Finisher.ConfidentNote: You deal half your @Damage[((@actor.flags.system.swashbuckler.preciseStrike)d6[precision])[@item.system.damage.damageType]]{Precise Strike damage} to the target. This damage type is that of the weapon or unarmed attack you used for the Strike.
Finisher.Label: 终结
Finisher.PreciseNote: On a failure, you apply your @Damage[((@actor.flags.system.swashbuckler.preciseStrike)d6[precision])[@item.system.damage.damageType]]{full precise strike damage} instead of half.
Finisher.TwirlingThrowNote: 该武器会在攻击后飞回你的手上

GoadingFeint.Note: On a successful Feint, the target take a -2 circumstance penalty to attack rolls against you instead of any other effects that you would gain when you Feint. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.rflbFzV44Fd6aBLE]{Effect: Goading Feint}

Swashbuckler.PanacheFailure: You gain panache until the end of your next turn @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.paKKHPds77fq5VTH]{Effect: Panache (Temporary)}

TheBiggerTheyAre.CriticalSuccess: On a critical success, if you successfully pass through the target's square, the target gains weakness to your precision damage until the end of your turn. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.SLXhPgaeKB0W3k1D]{Effect: The Bigger They Are}
TheBiggerTheyAre.Success: On a success, if you successfully pass through the target's square, the target gains weakness to your precision damage for your next attack. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.SLXhPgaeKB0W3k1D]{Effect: The Bigger They Are}

SwearOath.RollOptionLabel: 宣誓信条 — 为已准备的动作启用加值

TOTMToggle.FirstRangeIncrement: 需求目标位于第一射程增量内的能力正在生效
TOTMToggle.Frightened: Enable abilities that require a frightened target
TOTMToggle.Incorporeal: 启用需求目标为虚体的能力
TOTMToggle.OffGuard: 需求目标处于措手不及的能力正在生效
TOTMToggle.Prone: 启用需求目标状态为倒地的能力
TOTMToggle.Undead: 需求目标是不死生物的能力正在生效
TOTMToggle.Vampire: 需求目标是吸血鬼的能力正在生效

Target.Metal: 目标穿着金属护甲或由金属制成

Greater.InForestLabel: 高等丛林墨印(在森林中)

Major.InForestLabel: 上等丛林墨印(在森林中)

TenguFan.GustOfWind: You can cast the 1st-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.g8QqHpv2CWDwmIm1]{Gust of Wind} spell by activating your tengu feather fan. @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell|traits:air] save.
TenguFan.LightningBolt: You can cast the 5th-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.9AAkVUCwF6WVNNY2]{Lightning Bolt} spell by activating your tengu feather fan. @Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic|traits:electricity] save.
TenguFan.WallOfWind: You can cast the 3rd-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.it4ZsAi6XgvGcodc]{Wall of Wind} spell by activating your tengu feather fan. @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell|traits:air]{Fortitude saving throw} save.

WeaponFamiliarity.Prompt1: 从剑武器组中选择一个武器。
WeaponFamiliarity.Prompt2: 从剑武器组中选择第二件武器。

Adept.Description: 当你使用符止，你或你的盟友选择由触发的攻击造成的一种伤害类型，并获得针对该伤害类型的5点抗力，直到你的下一回合开始。在15级，这个延时抗力从5提升至10。
Adept.Prompt: 选择由触发的攻击造成的一种伤害类型。

Adept.DescriptionAlteration: 小啜时，提供给该生物的临时生命提升至2+你的魅力调整值+你的等级。豪饮时，杯会治疗该生物你每个等级5点生命值。
Adept.Note:
If you or an ally within 30 feet takes piercing or slashing damage from a foe's critical hit or takes persistent bleed damage, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.D91jQs0wleU5ml4K]{Drinking from the Chalice} before the end of your next turn grants that injured creature greater restoration to make up for its lost vitality.

On a sip, the temporary Hit Points granted to the creature increase to twice your level. When drained, the chalice heals the creature 5 Hit Points for each level you have.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.Sq558879cgEc1lGC]{Effect: Chalice Adept Benefit (Self)}

Lantern.BonusToggle: 目标处于灯的明亮光照内
Lantern.Label: 灯

Initiate.Addendum: Whenever you Exploit Vulnerability, you can also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.2YgXoHvJfrDHucMr]{Raise a Shield} as a free action.

Shield.Label: 盾
Shield.Prompt: 选择一个负载1或更轻的盾牌

Paragon.InitiativeToggle: 典——对生物或作祟的先攻

Adept.Cold: 目标豁免失败并承受伤害时颤抖，其速度承受-10尺状态减值，持续1轮。
Adept.Electricity: If the target fails its save and takes damage, it becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until the end of your next turn.
Adept.Fire: If the target fails its save and takes damage, it takes @Damage[1d10[persistent,fire]] (or @Damage[2d10[persistent,fire]] on a critical failure).
Adept.FireParagon: If the target fails its save and takes damage, it takes @Damage[2d10[persistent,fire]] (or @Damage[4d10[persistent,fire]] on a critical failure).

Paragon.Description: The range of Fling Magic increases to 180 feet. You gain the ability to choose between all three damage types (cold, electricity, and fire) each time you use Fling Magic. You can choose to target a single creature or to affect all creatures in a @Template[burst|distance:20].

Adept.Note: You deal @Damage[1[@item.system.damage.damageType]] damage, possibly applying any bonus damage due to the target's weakness.

ToggleProperty.TagTeam: 和另一个秘密结社成员夹击

TrapFinder.DefendingLabel: 寻找陷阱（防御陷阱效果）

TwinnedDefense.Prompt: 是否持用一把招架武器？

GuardsFury.ToggleLabel: 卫士狂怒 - 与指定盟友相邻

GreatBear.Description: 当你变形时，你可以获得熊的负重和体型。在使用熊煞形态时，你可以额外消耗一个动作，来获得1环级 *变巨术* 效果，持续法术的通常持续时间或直到你离开熊煞形态，先到为准。
GreatBear.MightyBear: 你内在的熊之力进一步拓展了你的体格。你通过大熊专长施放的 *变巨术* 升阶至4环级。

Note.Base: Your fangs Strike deals an additional @Damage[1d6[bleed]] damage.
Note.FourteenthLevel: Your fangs Strike deals an additional @Damage[2d6[bleed]] damage.
Note.TwentiethLevel: Your fangs Strike deals an additional @Damage[3d6[bleed]] damage.

VenomGlands.Label: 喷毒
VenomGlands.Note: On a critical hit, the target is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}.

VenomResistantVishkanya.PoisonSaveNote: 每次对抗毒素苦难进展的豁免检定若成功，阶段降低2；大成功则降低3。
VenomResistantVishkanya.VirulentSaveNote: 每次对抗恶性毒素苦难进展的豁免检定若成功，阶段降低1；大成功则降低2。

VitalityManipulationStance.Note:
When you use Stunning Fist, instead of saving against being stunned, you can choose to have the target make a @Check[fortitude|against:class] save against your class DC with the following results. You must choose to do this before the target rolls its save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target's muscles become temporarily weaker. For 1 round, the target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2}, and any time it attempts to take an action with the manipulate trait, the action is disrupted unless it succeeds at a flat check with a DC equal to 5 + its enfeebled value.

Failure As success, but the duration is 1 minute.

Critical Failure As success, but the duration is 1 minute, the flat check is DC 11, and the target takes -10-foot status penalty to all Speeds for the duration.

RegionalSpecialty.BonusToggle: 本地特产 — 启用豁免加值

WardMedic.Note: 当你使用治疗疾病或治疗伤势时，你可以同时治疗至多两个目标。若你在医疗技能上的熟练度达到大师，可以同时治疗至多四个目标；若达到传奇，可以同时治疗至多八个目标。

WardingRune.Prompt: 选择一个预言系以外的魔法学派。

GriefsFury.Toggle: 悲恸之怒 - 目标对你的链接伙伴造成伤害

Wayang.ShadowOfTheCourtier: 每日一次，如果你在建立印象的检定中失败但未遭到大失败，你可以重骰检定；这是一个幸运效果。

Weapon.Metal: 正在使用一把金属武器

WellspringMage.CriticalSuccess: You temporarily recover an expended spell slot of any rank of your choice. The temporary spell slot lasts for 1 minute, and if you don't use it by then, you experience an immediate @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.rollable-tables.RollTable.N0pDFNCffTe2Du39]{Wellspring Surge}.
WellspringMage.Failure: You generate a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.rollable-tables.RollTable.N0pDFNCffTe2Du39]{Wellspring Surge}, with a spell rank chosen randomly among your top three ranks of spell slots (or all your ranks if you have fewer than three)
WellspringMage.Initiative: When you roll initiative for a non-trivial combat encounter, as well as in other high-stress situations of the GM's choice, magic wells up within you. Attempt a @Check[flat|dc:6|traits:wellspring-magic].
WellspringMage.Success: You temporarily recover an expended spell slot of a spell rank chosen randomly among your top three ranks of spell slots (or all your ranks of spell slots if you have fewer than three). The slot lasts 3 rounds instead of 1 minute, otherwise you experience a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.rollable-tables.RollTable.N0pDFNCffTe2Du39]{Wellspring Surge}.

Werebat.Description: 你获得10尺的速度和15尺的飞行速度，并且拥有1d8穿刺尖牙无武装攻击。当由此形态给予的飞行速度进行飞行时，你必须在坚固表面上开始和结束你的移动，否则会立即坠落.
Werebat.Label: 蝠化人

Werebear.Description: 你获得25尺的速度，一个1d8穿刺噬咬无武装攻击，以及一个带有灵巧特性的1d6挥砍爪击无武装攻击。
Werebear.Label: 熊化人

Wereboar.Description: 你获得30尺的速度，以及一个带有横扫特征的1d8挥砍獠牙无武装攻击。
Wereboar.Label: 猪化人

Werecrocodile.Description: 你获得25尺的速度和15尺的游泳速度，并且拥有1d8穿刺噬咬无武装攻击，附带擒抱特质。在动物形态或混合形态下，你可以屏息2小时。
Werecrocodile.Label: 鳄化人

Weremoose.Description: 你获得25尺的速度，以及带有推撞特征的1d8穿刺鹿角无武装攻击。
Weremoose.Label: 鹿化人

Wererat.Description: 你获得25尺的速度，一个带有娴熟特征的1d6穿刺噬咬无武装攻击，以及一个带有灵巧和娴熟特征的1d4挥砍爪击无武装攻击。你的动物形态为小型。
Wererat.Label: 鼠化人

Wereshark.Description: 你获得15尺的速度和25尺的游泳速度，以及1d8穿刺噬咬的无武装攻击，并带有擒抱特性。你的混合形态获得两栖游泳25尺的特征。在你的动物形态中，你失去陆地移动速度，游泳速度增加到35尺，并且获得水生特征。
Wereshark.Label: 鲨化人

Weretiger.Description: 你获得25尺的速度，1d8穿刺伤害的爪子无武装攻击，以及一个带有灵巧特性的1d6挥砍伤害的爪子无武装攻击。
Weretiger.Label: 虎化人

Werewolf.Description: 你获得30尺的速度和一个带有摔绊特性以及1d8穿刺伤害的无武装攻击。
Werewolf.Label: 狼化人

YouDontSmellRight.Label: 设法确定一个生物是否伪装

BalancedLuck.Description: 当你施放或维持巫术时，你魔宠15尺内的一个生物由你选择对其AC+1状态加值或-1状态减值，直到你下回合开始。
BalancedLuck.Title: 谐运魔宠

FlowingScript.Description: 你的魔宠复盖着类似未知语言的字母的图案，这似乎会引人注目，即便它难以理解。当你施放或维持巫术时，字母会开始反复变化，导致分神。直到你下回合开始，你的魔宠可以为你和你的盟友提供夹击，就像它可以攻击且触及5尺一样；这是个视觉效果。
FlowingScript.Title: 盖经魔宠

FreezingRime.Description: Your familiar is cold to the touch, its breath always visible. When you Cast or Sustain a hex, you can cause ice to form in a @Template[burst|distance:5] centered on a square of your familiar's space. Those squares are difficult terrain until the start of your next turn.
FreezingRime.Title: 冻霜魔宠

KeenSenses.Description: When you Cast or Sustain a hex, your familiar gains your choice of an imprecise scent, tremorsense, or wavesense, with a range of 60 feet until the start of your next turn, and it can immediately @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sn2hIy1iIJX9Vpgj]{Point Out} as a free action.
KeenSenses.Title: 锐感魔宠

NimbleFlight.Description: 当你施放或维持一个巫术法术，你的魔宠可以飞行最多15尺；该移动不触发反应动作。
NimbleFlight.Title: 迅飞魔宠

OngoingMisery.Description: 你的魔宠似乎对除你之外的所有生物充满敌意，如果他们靠近就会对他们嘶吼。当你施放或维持巫术时，你的魔宠可以诅咒其15尺内的一个生物，延长其受到的任何负面状态持续时间1轮。这是一个诅咒效果。这只会延长具有持续时间的状态（例如“1轮”或“直到你下回合结束”），且不会阻止状态被其他方式移除。
OngoingMisery.Title: 长痛魔宠

OverwhelmingTides.Description: 当你施放或维持巫术时，你可以在你魔宠前面涌起一道小浪花。你魔宠10尺内的一个生物被推离魔宠5尺远。
OverwhelmingTides.Title: 狂潮魔宠

ParasiticMight.Description: When you Cast or Sustain a hex, one creature within 15 feet of your familiar with less than half of its maximum Hit Points becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} unless it succeeds at a @Check[fortitude|against:spell] saving throw.
ParasiticMight.Title: 寄生魔宠

RestoredSpirit.Description: 当你施放或维持巫术时，你魔宠15尺内一个自愿生物获得等同于2+你等级一半的临时生命值，持续到你下回合开始。
RestoredSpirit.Title: 补魂魔宠

StalkingNight.Description: When you Cast or Sustain a hex, and your familiar is adjacent to an enemy to which it's @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}, or undetected, the enemy becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.
StalkingNight.Title: 行夜魔宠

BolsteringAid.Description: 你的魔宠知道各种能帮上忙的技巧！当你施放或维持一个巫术时，如果你的魔宠与某位盟友相邻，该盟友在你下个回合开始前尝试的下次非攻击技能检定上获得+2状态加值。
BolsteringAid.Title: 强援魔宠 Familiar of Bolstering Aid

EnticingNegotiation.Description: When you Cast or Sustain a hex and your familiar is within 10 feet of an enemy, the enemy becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until the start of your next turn. Your familiar can only distract a single enemy per round in this way.
EnticingNegotiation.Title: 诱人魔宠 Familiar of Enticing Negotiation

ObscuringSnowfall.Description: When you Cast or Sustain a hex, you can cause clinging snow to fall in a @Template[type:burst|distance:5] centered on a square of your familiar's space. This snowfall remains until the start of your next turn, and enemies that enter these squares during that period are @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} until the start of your next turn.
ObscuringSnowfall.Title: 漫雪魔宠 Familiar of Obscuring Snowfall

PairedPerplexity.Description: When you Cast or Sustain a hex, your familiar seems to double and be in two places at once. One creature you choose within 20 feet of it is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} until the start of your next turn; this is a visual effect.
PairedPerplexity.Title: 双惑魔宠 Familiar of Paired Perplexity

SwarmsHeart.Description: 当你施放或维持一个巫术时，昆虫会蜂拥而至保护你和你的盟友。直到你的下个回合开始，你的魔宠为你或任何与其共享空间的盟友提供隐蔽。
SwarmsHeart.Title: 虫心魔宠 Familiar of Swarm's Heart

Seneschal.AdjustmentsAddendum: Instead of your patron's lesson, you gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.IqBfoUaWDennHYoZ]{Manifest Will} hex cantrip and your familiar learns one common 1st-rank spell of your choice from your spell list.

SympatheticStrike.Note: Until the beginning of your next turn, the target takes a –1 circumstance penalty to its saves against your hexes, or a –2 penalty if the triggering Strike was a critical hit. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.qBTJYpopY3AwFFUJ]{Effect: Sympathetic Strike}

EldritchNails.RollOptionLabel: 你连续两次指甲打击命中同一目标

IronTeeth.Note: A creature that you critically hit with a jaws Strike must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell] save gainst your class DC or Spell DC or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}.

ArcaneBond.DescriptionAddendum: 在符文领主的时代，即使是学者也被要求在必要时能够用武器保护自己，这也导致了在传统的法师法杖上附加刀刃的做法。你必须选择长武或矛作为你的奥术连结物品。作为奥术论题的替代，你有一枚私人符文，它会出现在你连结的武器上。这件武器就像一件法杖，拥有等同于你能施放的最高法术环级的充能，并包含有至多到此环级的你的原罪法术（包括你的戏法）。你的私人符文不属于性能符文，也不计入武器的符文上限。如果你准备了一件法杖，它就会与你的连结物品融合，直到你的下一次日常准备，加入它的充能和法术列表。融合时，武器的杖柄具有法杖的美学特征。
ArcaneBond.Label: 奥术连结与私人符文

Sin.Prompt: 选择一种原罪进行专攻。

Spellshape1.Prompt: 选择一个1级法师塑法专长

ShieldingFormation.ResistanceToggle: 防御阵型- 终止AC加值来获得抗力

InescapableGrasp.Note: If you attempt to use a teleportation spell or effect to Escape, you must succeed at a @Check[flat|dc:15] or the spell fails.

Note.CriticalSuccess: The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} until the end of its next turn and then is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} for 1 minute.
Note.Success: The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} until the end of its next turn.

Strangle.FlatCheckNote: 尽管其难以开口，目标仍然可以用嘶哑的低语堪堪发声，譬如施放具有专注与操作特征的法术时，目标必须通过一次DC 10的纯骰检定而非常规受擒状态下的DC5纯骰检定。
Strangle.VerbalNote: You must succeed at a @Check[flat|dc:10] or lose any action that requires speech.

Note.CriticalSuccess: The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} until the end of its next turn and then is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} for 1 minute.
Note.Success: The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} until the end of its next turn.

Suplex.Note: The target lands @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} and you immediately release your hold on the target.

KnowTheBeat.RollOptionLabel: 通晓关节 — 调查犯罪

Text.Damage: 你的精魂之力爆发以惩处敌人。你的所有打击和攻击法术造成额外1d4精魂伤害，你的打击和攻击法术获得精魂特征。
Text.Description: 每日一次当你使用释放妖力时，你可以获得以下一种额外增益，持续1分钟或直到你再次变身。
Text.Enlarge: 你的身体变得极端巨大。变巨术效果升阶至4环级。
Text.Fly: 你能够凭空跃起。你获得 *飞行术* 效果。
Text.Frequency: 你每天可以无限次使用释放妖力。
Text.Title: **传奇妖物**

UnleashYaoguaiMight.BornOfAnimal: **动物** 你的皮变厚，赋予AC+1环境加值。
UnleashYaoguaiMight.BornOfCelestial: **仙界** 你恢复了你的一些仙界之力，赋予你与15尺内你的盟友攻击掷骰+1状态加值。

UnleashYaoguaiMight.Description: 当你进入妖怪形态时，你利用你的内在魔力变为更巨大的形态。当你变身进入妖怪形态时，你可以花费一个额外的动作来获得变巨术效果，以及基于你传承的额外效果。此效果持续1分钟或直到你再次使用变身。
UnleashYaoguaiMight.UsedMoveAction: 使用过了带有移动特征的动作。
